FILE src/NxtUI.Core/Services/LogPathDiscoveryService.cs
LENGTH 4960
using System.Collections.Concurrent;
using System.Linq;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Options;
using NxtUI.Configuration;
using NxtUI.Logging;
using NxtUI.Core.Models;

namespace NxtUI.Core.Services;

public sealed class LogPathDiscoveryService(IOptions<LogPathSettings> options, ILogger<LogPathDiscoveryService> log) : ILogPathDiscoveryService
{
    // key → running or completed search task
    private readonly ConcurrentDictionary<string, Task<string?>> _cache = new();

    public event Action<string>? OnPathResolved;

    public static string CacheKey(ServiceStatus svc, string env) =>
        $"{env}|{svc.HostName}|{svc.ServiceName}|{svc.ProcessId}";

    public string? GetCachedPath(ServiceStatus svc, string env)
    {
        if (_cache.TryGetValue(CacheKey(svc, env), out var task) && task.IsCompletedSuccessfully)
            return task.Result;
        return null;
    }

    public bool IsSearching(ServiceStatus svc, string env) =>
        _cache.TryGetValue(CacheKey(svc, env), out var task) && !task.IsCompleted;

    public void EnsureDiscovering(ServiceStatus svc, string env)
    {
        var key = CacheKey(svc, env);
        var added = false;
        _cache.GetOrAdd(key, _ => { added = true; return RunSearchAsync(svc, env, key); });
        if (added)
            log.LogDebug("discovery [{Env}]: starting search for {Svc}@{Host} pid={Pid}", env, svc.ServiceName, svc.HostName, svc.ProcessId);
    }

    public async Task<string?> FindNowAsync(ServiceStatus svc, string env)
    {
        var key = CacheKey(svc, env);

        // Reuse any in-progress search
        if (_cache.TryGetValue(key, out var existing) && !existing.IsCompleted)
            return await existing;

        // Start a fresh search (replaces a completed null result from a previous attempt)
        var task = RunSearchAsync(svc, env, key);
        _cache[key] = task;
        return await task;
    }

    // ── Internal ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task<string?> RunSearchAsync(ServiceStatus svc, string env, string key)
    {
        var result = await Task.Run(() => SearchSync(svc, env));
        if (result is not null)
        {
            log.LogDebug("discovery [{Env}]: found folder for {Svc}@{Host} → {Path}", env, svc.ServiceName, svc.HostName, result);
            OnPathResolved?.Invoke(key);
        }
        else
        {
            log.LogDebug("discovery [{Env}]: no folder found for {Svc}@{Host} pid={Pid}", env, svc.ServiceName, svc.HostName, svc.ProcessId);
        }
        return result;
    }

    private string? SearchSync(ServiceStatus svc, string env)
    {
        foreach (var template in options.Value.ServiceTemplates)
        {
            var expanded = ExpandTemplate(template, svc, env);
            log.LogDebug("discovery [{Env}]: trying {Expanded}", env, expanded);
            var resolved = ResolveWildcard(expanded);
            if (resolved is not null) return resolved;
        }
        return null;
    }

    private static string ExpandTemplate(string template, ServiceStatus svc, string env) =>
        LogPathTemplate.Expand(template, svc, env);

    /// <summary>
    /// Resolves a path that may contain * wildcards in one or more segments.
    /// Recursively expands each wildcard segment via Directory.GetDirectories.
    /// </summary>
    private static string? ResolveWildcard(string path)
    {
        if (!path.Contains('*'))
            return Directory.Exists(path) ? path : null;

        var starIdx   = path.IndexOf('*');
        var slashPrev = path.LastIndexOf('\\', starIdx);
        if (slashPrev < 0) return null;

        var basePath  = path[..slashPrev];
        var slashNext = path.IndexOf('\\', starIdx);

        string segment, remainder;
        if (slashNext < 0)
        {
            segment   = path[(slashPrev + 1)..];
            remainder = string.Empty;
        }
        else
        {
            segment   = path[(slashPrev + 1)..slashNext];
            remainder = path[slashNext..]; // includes leading backslash
        }

        if (!Directory.Exists(basePath)) return null;

        string[] matches;
        try { matches = Directory.GetDirectories(basePath, segment); }
        catch { return null; }

        // Pick the most-recently-modified directory first so active log sessions
        // win over stale folders from previous runs that sort earlier alphabetically.
        matches = [.. matches.OrderByDescending(Directory.GetLastWriteTimeUtc)];

        foreach (var match in matches)
        {
            var candidate = string.IsNullOrEmpty(remainder) ? match : match + remainder;
            var result = ResolveWildcard(candidate);
            if (result is not null) return result;
        }
        return null;
    }
}
FILE src/NxtUI.Core/Services/PerformanceEventStore.cs
LENGTH 2210
using NxtUI.Core.Models;

namespace NxtUI.Core.Services;

/// <summary>
/// In-memory event store that accumulates PerformanceEvents
/// keyed by (chunkId, service, processId).
/// Thread-safe for concurrent polling/updates.
/// </summary>
public class PerformanceEventStore
{
    private readonly object _lock = new();
    private readonly Dictionary<string, PerformanceEvent> _events = new();

    /// <summary>
    /// Returns a read-only snapshot of all events.
    /// </summary>
    public IReadOnlyDictionary<string, PerformanceEvent> Snapshot
    {
        get
        {
            lock (_lock)
            {
                return new Dictionary<string, PerformanceEvent>(_events);
            }
        }
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Total number of unique events in the store.
    /// </summary>
    public int Count
    {
        get
        {
            lock (_lock)
            {
                return _events.Count;
            }
        }
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Timestamp of the most recent event, or null if empty.
    /// </summary>
    public DateTime? LastEventTimestamp
    {
        get
        {
            lock (_lock)
            {
                return _events.Values.MaxBy(e => e.Timestamp)?.Timestamp;
            }
        }
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Upsert or merge an event by its composite key.
    /// If the key exists, the newer event (by timestamp) replaces it.
    /// </summary>
    public void UpsertEvent(PerformanceEvent evt)
    {
        if (evt is null) return;

        lock (_lock)
        {
            if (!_events.TryGetValue(evt.Id, out var existing) || evt.Timestamp > existing.Timestamp)
                _events[evt.Id] = evt;
        }
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Merge multiple events at once (batch upsert).
    /// </summary>
    public void UpsertEvents(IEnumerable<PerformanceEvent> events)
    {
        if (events is null) return;

        foreach (var evt in events)
        {
            UpsertEvent(evt);
        }
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Clear all events (for testing or reset).
    /// </summary>
    public void Clear()
    {
        lock (_lock)
        {
            _events.Clear();
        }
    }
}
FILE src/NxtUI.Core/Services/TopologyComputationService.cs
LENGTH 10391
using NxtUI.Core.Models;

namespace NxtUI.Core.Services;

/// <summary>
/// Computes a flow graph topology from the in-memory event store.
/// Infers service nodes with pipeline rows, and pipeline-to-pipeline edges,
/// per design doc §8.2.
/// </summary>
public class TopologyComputationService
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Recent-activity window used to decide whether a pipeline is "Active"
    /// (priority 2) vs merely "InProgress" (priority 3). A pipeline counts
    /// as Active if it has had a finish event within this window of the
    /// latest known event time.
    /// </summary>
    private static readonly TimeSpan RecentActivityWindow = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(15);

    /// <summary>
    /// Computes topology from the event store snapshot.
    /// </summary>
    public Topology ComputeTopology(IReadOnlyDictionary<string, PerformanceEvent> eventStore)
    {
        if (eventStore == null || eventStore.Count == 0)
        {
            return new Topology { TotalChunks = 0, TotalEvents = 0 };
        }

        var topology = new Topology { TotalEvents = eventStore.Count };

        var events = eventStore.Values.ToList();
        var latestEventTime = events.Max(e => e.Finish ?? e.Start);

        // ── Phase 1: group events by (service, pipeline) ────────────────
        var byServicePipeline = events
            .GroupBy(e => (e.Service, e.Pipeline))
            .ToDictionary(g => g.Key, g => g.ToList());

        var nodesByService = new Dictionary<string, TopologyNode>();
        var pipelineRowsByKey = new Dictionary<(string Service, string Pipeline), PipelineRow>();

        foreach (var ((service, pipeline), pipelineEvents) in byServicePipeline)
        {
            if (!nodesByService.TryGetValue(service, out var node))
            {
                node = new TopologyNode { Id = service, Label = service };
                nodesByService[service] = node;
            }

            var row = BuildPipelineRow(pipeline, pipelineEvents, latestEventTime);
            node.Pipelines.Add(row);
            pipelineRowsByKey[(service, pipeline)] = row;
        }

        // ── Phase 2: per-node rollups (instance count, header state) ────
        foreach (var node in nodesByService.Values)
        {
            node.Pipelines = node.Pipelines.OrderBy(p => p.Name, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase).ToList();

            node.InstanceCount = node.Pipelines
                .SelectMany(p => p.Instances)
                .Select(i => $"{i.Server}:{i.ProcessId}")
                .Distinct()
                .Count();

            node.HeaderState = node.Pipelines.Count == 0
                ? PipelineState.NotStarted
                : node.Pipelines.Max(p => p.State); // enum ordered so highest = highest priority
        }

        topology.Nodes = nodesByService.Values.OrderBy(n => n.Label, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase).ToList();

        var allChunkIds = events.Select(e => e.ChunkId).Distinct().ToHashSet();
        topology.TotalChunks = allChunkIds.Count;
        topology.TotalDone = events.Count(e => e.IsDone);
        topology.TotalInProgress = events.Count(e => !e.IsDone);

        // ── Phase 3: infer pipeline-to-pipeline edges from chunk flow ────
        // For each chunk, order the (service, pipeline) hops it visited by
        // start time. Consecutive distinct hops become directed edges.
        var eventsByChunk = events
            .GroupBy(e => e.ChunkId)
            .ToDictionary(g => g.Key, g => g.OrderBy(e => e.Start).ToList());

        var edgesByKey = new Dictionary<(string, string, string, string), TopologyEdge>();

        // Track, per (service,pipeline), the set of chunkIds that have a
        // *finished* event there — used for the waiting estimate below.
        var doneChunksByPipeline = byServicePipeline.ToDictionary(
            kv => kv.Key,
            kv => kv.Value.Where(e => e.IsDone).Select(e => e.ChunkId).ToHashSet());

        var anyEventChunksByPipeline = byServicePipeline.ToDictionary(
            kv => kv.Key,
            kv => kv.Value.Select(e => e.ChunkId).ToHashSet());

        foreach (var chunkEvents in eventsByChunk.Values)
        {
            (string Service, string Pipeline)? prevHop = null;

            foreach (var evt in chunkEvents)
            {
                var hop = (evt.Service, evt.Pipeline);

                if (prevHop.HasValue && prevHop.Value != hop)
                {
                    var key = (prevHop.Value.Service, prevHop.Value.Pipeline, hop.Service, hop.Pipeline);
                    if (!edgesByKey.TryGetValue(key, out var edge))
                    {
                        edge = new TopologyEdge
                        {
                            Source = prevHop.Value.Service,
                            SourcePipeline = prevHop.Value.Pipeline,
                            Target = hop.Service,
                            TargetPipeline = hop.Pipeline,
                        };
                        edgesByKey[key] = edge;
                    }
                    edge.DoneCount++;
                }

                prevHop = hop;
            }
        }

        // ── Phase 4: waiting estimate per edge ───────────────────────────
        // waiting ≈ count of chunkIds where source pipeline has finish set
        // but target pipeline has no event yet (§8.2).
        foreach (var edge in edgesByKey.Values)
        {
            var sourceKey = (edge.Source, edge.SourcePipeline);
            var targetKey = (edge.Target, edge.TargetPipeline);

            var sourceDone = doneChunksByPipeline.GetValueOrDefault(sourceKey, new HashSet<string>());
            var targetSeen = anyEventChunksByPipeline.GetValueOrDefault(targetKey, new HashSet<string>());

            edge.WaitingEstimate = sourceDone.Count(c => !targetSeen.Contains(c));

            // Edge colour inherits the source pipeline row's state.
            edge.State = pipelineRowsByKey.TryGetValue(sourceKey, out var sourceRow)
                ? sourceRow.State
                : PipelineState.NotStarted;
        }

        topology.Edges = edgesByKey.Values
            .OrderBy(e => e.Source, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            .ThenBy(e => e.SourcePipeline, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            .ThenBy(e => e.Target, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            .ThenBy(e => e.TargetPipeline, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            .ToList();

        // ── Phase 5: overall estimated progress (§8.3) ──────────────────
        // Denominator: max hop count observed across chunks (i.e. number of
        // distinct (service,pipeline) nodes in the longest observed chain)
        // × total unique chunkIds seen.
        var maxHops = eventsByChunk.Values.Count == 0
            ? 0
            : eventsByChunk.Values.Max(chunkEvents =>
                chunkEvents.Select(e => (e.Service, e.Pipeline)).Distinct().Count());

        var denominator = (double)maxHops * allChunkIds.Count;
        var numerator = (double)events.Count(e => e.IsDone);

        topology.EstimatedProgress = denominator > 0
            ? Math.Clamp(numerator / denominator, 0.0, 1.0)
            : 0.0;

        return topology;
    }

    // ── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private static PipelineRow BuildPipelineRow(string pipeline, List<PerformanceEvent> pipelineEvents, DateTime latestEventTime)
    {
        var done = pipelineEvents.Count(e => e.IsDone);
        var inProgress = pipelineEvents.Count(e => !e.IsDone);
        var errors = pipelineEvents.Count(e => e.IsError);

        var row = new PipelineRow
        {
            Name = pipeline,
            Topic = InferTopicName(pipeline),
            DoneCount = done,
            InProgressCount = inProgress,
            ErrorCount = errors,
            Progress = (done + inProgress) > 0 ? (double)done / (done + inProgress) : 0.0,
        };

        // Recent throughput: fraction of "done" events that finished within
        // the recent-activity window of the latest known event time.
        var recentDone = pipelineEvents.Count(e =>
            e.Finish.HasValue && (latestEventTime - e.Finish.Value) <= RecentActivityWindow);
        row.RecentThroughputScore = done > 0
            ? Math.Clamp((double)recentDone / Math.Max(done, 1), 0.0, 1.0)
            : 0.0;

        row.State = DetermineState(row, recentDone);

        // Per-instance breakdown, sorted by server then PID per §8.2.
        row.Instances = pipelineEvents
            .GroupBy(e => (e.Server, e.ProcessId))
            .Select(g => new InstanceStats(
                server: g.Key.Server,
                processId: g.Key.ProcessId,
                doneCount: g.Count(e => e.IsDone),
                inProgressCount: g.Count(e => !e.IsDone)))
            .OrderBy(i => i.Server, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            .ThenBy(i => i.ProcessId, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            .ToList();

        return row;
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Priority order per §8.2 (1 = highest):
    /// 1. Errored, 2. Active, 3. InProgress, 4. Idle, 5. Completed, 6. NotStarted.
    /// </summary>
    private static PipelineState DetermineState(PipelineRow row, int recentDone)
    {
        if (row.ErrorCount > 0) return PipelineState.Errored;
        if (row.InProgressCount == 0 && row.DoneCount == 0) return PipelineState.NotStarted;
        if (recentDone > 0) return PipelineState.Active;
        if (row.InProgressCount > 0) return PipelineState.InProgress;
        if (row.DoneCount > 0 && row.InProgressCount == 0) return PipelineState.Completed;
        return PipelineState.Idle;
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Derives a plausible Kafka topic name from a pipeline name for the
    /// hover-tooltip link (§8.2). The real topic name will come from the
    /// backend once available — this is a presentation-layer placeholder.
    /// </summary>
    private static string InferTopicName(string pipeline) =>
        string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(pipeline) ? string.Empty : pipeline.ToLowerInvariant().Replace(' ', '-') + "-events";
}

@namespace NxtUI.Web.Components
@inject IJSRuntime JS
@implements IAsyncDisposable

<div class="bm-d3-flow-graph">
    @* D3 owns this inner div entirely — Blazor never touches its children *@
    <div @ref="_graphRef" class="bm-d3-graph-host"></div>
    <button class="bm-graph-fit-btn" title="Fit to view" @onclick="FitToViewAsync">
        <MudIcon Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.CenterFocusWeak" Size="Size.Small" />
    </button>
</div>

@code {
    [Parameter, EditorRequired] public Topology Topology { get; set; } = new();

    /// <summary>
    /// Whether the owning tab is currently focused/visible. When false, the
    /// canvas is hidden (display:none) and the D3 animation loop pauses
    /// entirely (§9 "Unfocused canvas consuming GPU" mitigation).
    /// </summary>
    [Parameter] public bool IsVisible { get; set; } = true;

    private ElementReference _graphRef;
    private IJSObjectReference? _module;
    private bool _previousIsVisible = true;

    protected override async Task OnAfterRenderAsync(bool firstRender)
    {
        if (firstRender)
        {
            try
            {
                _module = await JS.InvokeAsync<IJSObjectReference>("import", "./js/d3-graph.js");
                await _module.InvokeVoidAsync("init", _graphRef, GetHandleKey());
                _previousIsVisible = IsVisible;
                await _module.InvokeVoidAsync("setVisible", GetHandleKey(), IsVisible);
                await PushTopologyAsync();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.WriteLine($"[D3FlowGraph] init failed: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }
    }

    protected override async Task OnParametersSetAsync()
    {
        if (_module is null) return;

        if (IsVisible != _previousIsVisible)
        {
            _previousIsVisible = IsVisible;
            try
            {
                await _module.InvokeVoidAsync("setVisible", GetHandleKey(), IsVisible);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.WriteLine($"[D3FlowGraph] setVisible failed: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        await PushTopologyAsync();
    }

    private string GetHandleKey() => $"d3flowgraph-{GetHashCode()}";

    private async Task PushTopologyAsync()
    {
        if (_module is null) return;
        try
        {
            await _module.InvokeVoidAsync("update", GetHandleKey(), Topology);
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            Console.WriteLine($"[D3FlowGraph] update failed: {ex.Message}");
        }
    }

    private async Task FitToViewAsync()
    {
        if (_module is null) return;
        try
        {
            await _module.InvokeVoidAsync("fitToView", GetHandleKey());
        }
        catch { }
    }

    public async ValueTask DisposeAsync()
    {
        if (_module is not null)
        {
            try { await _module.InvokeVoidAsync("dispose", GetHandleKey()); }
            catch { }
            try { await _module.DisposeAsync(); }
            catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
        }
    }
}

    [Parameter] public string  Value           { get; set; } = string.Empty;

    [Parameter] public string? Class           { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public int     DebounceMs      { get; set; } = 300;
    [Parameter] public string  Placeholder     { get; set; } = "Filter…";

    [Parameter] public (string Aliases, string Label)[] FieldHints { get; set; } = [];

    private MudMenu?      _menu;
    private MudTextField<string>? _field;

    public async Task FocusAsync()
    {
        if (_field is not null) await _field.FocusAsync();
    }

    private async Task OpenFullReference()
    {
        if (_menu is not null) await _menu.CloseMenuAsync();
        _tabSvc.OpenOrFocus(TabModel.CreateFilterHelp());
    }

    private Task NotifyChanged(string v) => OnFilterChanged.InvokeAsync(v);

    private async Task ClearAsync()
    {
        Value = string.Empty;
        await OnFilterChanged.InvokeAsync(string.Empty);
    }
}

<MudDialog>

</MudDialog>

@code {
    [CascadingParameter] IMudDialogInstance MudDialog { get; set; } = default!;

    [Parameter] public string TopicName   { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    [Parameter] public string Environment { get; set; } = string.Empty;

    private List<KafkaTopicConsumerGroup> _groups  = new();
    private bool                          _loading = true;
    private string?                       _error   = null;

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        try   { _groups = (await KafkaSvc.GetTopicConsumerGroupsAsync(Environment, TopicName)).ToList(); }
        catch (Exception ex) { _error = ex.Message; }
        finally { _loading = false; }
    }

    private static Color StateColor(string state) => state switch
    {
        "Stable"      => Color.Success,
        "Rebalancing" => Color.Warning,
        "Dead"        => Color.Error,
        _             => Color.Default,
    };
}

FILE src/NxtUI.Web/Components/KafkaTopicInfoDialog.razor.cs
LENGTH 798
namespace NxtUI.Web.Components;

public partial class KafkaTopicInfoDialog
{
    private static string FormatRetention(long ms) => ms switch
    {
        < 0                => "∞",
        0                  => "0",
        < 3_600_000        => $"{ms / 60_000}m",
        < 86_400_000       => $"{ms / 3_600_000}h",
        < 7L * 86_400_000  => $"{ms / 86_400_000}d",
        < 30L * 86_400_000 => $"{ms / (7L * 86_400_000)}w",
        _                  => $"{ms / (30L * 86_400_000)}mo",
    };

    private static string FormatBytes(long b) => b switch
    {
        < 1024                => $"{b} B",
        < 1024 * 1024         => $"{b / 1024} KB",
        < 1024L * 1024 * 1024 => $"{b / (1024 * 1024)} MB",
        _                     => $"{b / (1024L * 1024 * 1024)} GB",
    };
}

                                         Icon="@(LoadingNodes.Contains(c1.RelativePath) ? Icons.Material.Outlined.HourglassEmpty : Icons.Material.Outlined.Folder)"
                                         Expanded="@Expanded.Contains(c1.RelativePath)"
                                         ExpandedChanged="@((bool exp) => OnExpandedChanged.InvokeAsync((c1, exp)))"
                                         OnClick="@((MouseEventArgs _) => OnItemClick.InvokeAsync(c1))">
                            @if (ChildCache.TryGetValue(c1.RelativePath, out var ch2))
                            {
                                @foreach (var c2 in ch2)

                                            {
                                                <MudTreeViewItem @key="@c3.RelativePath" Value="@c3" Text="@c3.Name"
                                                                 Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Folder"
                                                                 OnClick="@((MouseEventArgs _) => OnItemClick.InvokeAsync(c3))" />
                                            }
                                        }
                                    </MudTreeViewItem>
                                }
                            }
                        </MudTreeViewItem>
                    }
                }
            </MudTreeViewItem>
        }
    </MudTreeView>
}

@code {
    [Parameter] public bool    IsSelected        { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public string  FindTerm          { get; set; } = "";
    [Parameter] public bool    IsRegex           { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public bool    CaseSensitive     { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public int     MatchCount        { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public int     MatchCurrent      { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public string  FilterStr         { get; set; } = "";
    [Parameter] public string? FilterError       { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public int     TotalCount        { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public int     VisibleCount      { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public bool    WordWrap          { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public bool    FontDecreaseDisabled { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public bool    FontIncreaseDisabled { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public (string Aliases, string Label)[] FieldHints { get; set; } = [];

    [Parameter] public EventCallback<string> OnFindTermChanged { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public EventCallback         OnRunFind         { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public EventCallback<bool>   OnRegexToggled    { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public EventCallback<bool>   OnCaseToggled     { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public EventCallback         OnNextMatch       { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public EventCallback         OnPrevMatch       { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public EventCallback<string> OnFilterChanged   { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public EventCallback         OnNextBookmark    { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public EventCallback         OnPrevBookmark    { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public EventCallback         OnIncreaseFont    { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public EventCallback         OnDecreaseFont    { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public EventCallback<bool>   OnWrapToggled     { get; set; }

    private MudTextField<string>? _findFieldRef;
    private FilterBox?            _filterBoxRef;

    // Local mirror so the MudTextField can bind — changes are forwarded to parent
    private string _findTermLocal
    {
        get => FindTerm;
        set => OnFindTermChanged.InvokeAsync(value);
    }

    private string MatchLabel =>
        MatchCount == 0 ? "" : $"{MatchCurrent}/{MatchCount}";

    public async Task FocusFindAsync()
    {
        if (_findFieldRef is not null) await _findFieldRef.FocusAsync().AsTask();
    }

    public async Task FocusFilterAsync()
    {
        if (_filterBoxRef is not null) await _filterBoxRef.FocusAsync();
    }

    private async Task OnAdornmentClickAsync() => await OnRunFind.InvokeAsync();

    private async Task OnFindKeyDownInternal(KeyboardEventArgs e)
    {
        if (e.Key == "Enter")
        {
            if (e.ShiftKey) await OnPrevMatch.InvokeAsync();
            else            await OnRunFind.InvokeAsync();
        }
    }
}

@namespace NxtUI.Web.Components
@inject IJSRuntime JS
@implements IAsyncDisposable

<div class="bm-lv-body" @ref="_bodyRef"></div>

@code {
    [Parameter] public EventCallback<string> OnWordDoubleClicked { get; set; }

    private ElementReference                   _bodyRef;
    private DotNetObjectReference<LogViewport>? _dotNetRef;

    // ── Public records used by callers ────────────────────────────────────

    public sealed record MatchResult(int Count, int Current);
    public sealed record FilterResult(int Total, int Visible);

    // ── JS render calls ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

    public async Task<bool> RenderAsync(string rawText, object opts)
    {
        try
        {
            await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("logViewer.render", _bodyRef, rawText, opts);
            await RegisterRefAsync();
            return true;
        }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { return false; }
        catch (Exception ex) { Console.Error.WriteLine($"[LogViewport] render: {ex.Message}"); return false; }
    }

    public async Task<bool> RenderLocalFileAsync(string key, object opts)
    {
        try
        {
            await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("logViewer.renderLocalFile", _bodyRef, key, opts);
            await RegisterRefAsync();
            return true;
        }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { return false; }
        catch (Exception ex) { Console.Error.WriteLine($"[LogViewport] renderLocalFile: {ex.Message}"); return false; }
    }

    public async Task AppendRawAsync(string text)
    {
        try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("logViewer.appendRaw", _bodyRef, text); }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
    }

    // ── Find ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    public async Task<MatchResult> FindAsync(string term, object opts)
    {
        try { return await JS.InvokeAsync<MatchResult>("logViewer.find", _bodyRef, term, opts); }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { return new(0, 0); }
    }

    public async Task<MatchResult> NextMatchAsync()
    {
        try { return await JS.InvokeAsync<MatchResult>("logViewer.nextMatch", _bodyRef); }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { return new(0, 0); }
    }

    public async Task<MatchResult> PrevMatchAsync()
    {
        try { return await JS.InvokeAsync<MatchResult>("logViewer.prevMatch", _bodyRef); }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { return new(0, 0); }
    }

    // ── Filter ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    public async Task<FilterResult> SetFilterAsync(string expr)
    {
        try { return await JS.InvokeAsync<FilterResult>("logViewer.setFilter", _bodyRef, expr); }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { return new(0, 0); }
        catch (Exception ex) { throw new InvalidOperationException(ex.Message, ex); }
    }

    // ── Bookmarks ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    public async Task PrevBookmarkAsync()
    {
        try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("logViewer.prevBookmark", _bodyRef); }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
    }

    public async Task NextBookmarkAsync()
    {
        try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("logViewer.nextBookmark", _bodyRef); }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
    }

    // ── Display ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    public async Task SetFontSizeAsync(int size)
    {
        try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("logViewer.setFontSize", _bodyRef, size); }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
    }

    public async Task SetWordWrapAsync(bool wrap)
    {
        try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("logViewer.setWordWrap", _bodyRef, wrap); }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
    }

    // ── Misc ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    public async Task<int> GetCurrentTopLineAsync()
    {
        try { return await JS.InvokeAsync<int>("logViewer.getCurrentTopLine", _bodyRef); }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { return 0; }
    }

    // ── Double-click word callback ────────────────────────────────────────

    [JSInvokable]
    public Task OnWordSelected(string word) => OnWordDoubleClicked.InvokeAsync(word);

    // ── Internals ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task RegisterRefAsync()
    {
        _dotNetRef ??= DotNetObjectReference.Create(this);
        try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("logViewer.registerDotNetRef", _bodyRef, _dotNetRef); }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
    }

    public async ValueTask DisposeAsync()
    {
        _dotNetRef?.Dispose();
        try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("logViewer.destroy", _bodyRef); }
        catch { }
    }
}

@namespace NxtUI.Web.Components
@inject IJSRuntime JS

<MudDialog>
    <TitleContent>Open log file</TitleContent>
    <DialogContent>

                    <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.OpenInBrowser"
                                   Variant="Variant.Filled" Color="Color.Primary" Size="Size.Medium"
                                   Disabled="@string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Path)"
                                   OnClick="@(() => Submit(WsPlacement.Replace))" />
                </MudTooltip>
                <MudTooltip Text="Open to the right">
                    <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.KeyboardArrowRight"
                                   Variant="Variant.Outlined" Size="Size.Medium"
                                   Disabled="@string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Path)"
                                   OnClick="@(() => Submit(WsPlacement.Right))" />
                </MudTooltip>

                <div></div>
                <MudTooltip Text="Open below">
                    <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.KeyboardArrowDown"
                                   Variant="Variant.Outlined" Size="Size.Medium"
                                   Disabled="@string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Path)"
                                   OnClick="@(() => Submit(WsPlacement.Bottom))" />
                </MudTooltip>
                <div></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </DialogContent>
</MudDialog>

@code {
    [CascadingParameter] IMudDialogInstance MudDialog { get; set; } = default!;

    public enum WsPlacement { Replace, Left, Right, Top, Bottom }

    private string Path = string.Empty;
    private MudTextField<string>? _field;
    private DotNetObjectReference<OpenLogFileDialog>? _selfRef;

    protected override async Task OnAfterRenderAsync(bool firstRender)
    {
        if (firstRender && _field is not null)
            await _field.FocusAsync();
    }

    private async Task BrowseFile()
    {
        _selfRef ??= DotNetObjectReference.Create(this);
        await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("bmOpenLocalLogFile", _selfRef);
    }

    [JSInvokable]
    public void OnLocalFileOpened(string key, string filename)
    {
        InvokeAsync(() =>
        {
            Path = "local:" + key;
            StateHasChanged();
        });
    }

    private void OnKeyDown(KeyboardEventArgs e)
    {
        if (e.Key == "Enter" && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Path))
            Submit(WsPlacement.Replace);
    }

    private void Submit(WsPlacement placement) =>
        MudDialog.Close(DialogResult.Ok((Path.Trim(), placement)));

    public void Dispose() => _selfRef?.Dispose();
}
FILE src/NxtUI.Web/Components/WorkspacePanel.razor
LENGTH 4437
@namespace NxtUI.Web.Components
@using NxtUI.Web.Models
@using NxtUI.Web.Pages
@inject IJSRuntime JS
@implements IDisposable

@if (Node is WsLeaf leaf)
{
    var isSelected = ReferenceEquals(leaf, SelectedLeaf);
    <div class="ws-leaf"
         style="flex:1;min-width:0;min-height:0;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;position:relative;"
         @onclick="@(() => OnSelect.InvokeAsync(leaf))" @onclick:stopPropagation="false">
        <LogViewer Path="@leaf.Path"
                   Env="@leaf.Env"
                   FileName="@leaf.FileName"
                   IsSelected="@isSelected"
                   IsMultiPane="@ShowRing"
                   OnOpen="@(() => OnOpen.InvokeAsync(leaf))"
                   OnDupH="@(() => OnDupH.InvokeAsync(leaf))"
                   OnDupV="@(() => OnDupV.InvokeAsync(leaf))"
                   OnClose="@(() => OnClose.InvokeAsync(leaf))" />
        @if (isSelected && ShowRing)
        {
            <div class="ws-selection-ring" aria-hidden="true"></div>
        }
    </div>
}
else if (Node is WsSplit split)
{
    var flexDir = split.Dir == WsDir.H ? "row" : "column";
    var growA   = (split.Ratio * 10000d).ToString("F0", System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);
    var growB   = ((1d - split.Ratio) * 10000d).ToString("F0", System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);

    <div class="ws-split" style="flex:1;min-width:0;min-height:0;display:flex;flex-direction:@flexDir;overflow:hidden;"
         @ref="_containerRef">

        <div class="ws-pane" style="flex:@(growA) @(growA) 0;min-width:0;min-height:0;overflow:hidden;display:flex;">
            <WorkspacePanel Node="@split.A"
                            SelectedLeaf="@SelectedLeaf"
                            ShowRing="@ShowRing"
                            OnSelect="OnSelect"
                            OnOpen="OnOpen"
                            OnDupH="OnDupH"
                            OnDupV="OnDupV"
                            OnClose="OnClose"
                            OnRatioChanged="OnRatioChanged" />
        </div>

        <div class="@(split.Dir == WsDir.H ? "ws-handle-h" : "ws-handle-v")"
             @onmousedown="@(e => OnHandleMouseDown(e, split))"></div>

        <div class="ws-pane" style="flex:@(growB) @(growB) 0;min-width:0;min-height:0;overflow:hidden;display:flex;">
            <WorkspacePanel Node="@split.B"
                            SelectedLeaf="@SelectedLeaf"
                            ShowRing="@ShowRing"
                            OnSelect="OnSelect"
                            OnOpen="OnOpen"
                            OnDupH="OnDupH"
                            OnDupV="OnDupV"
                            OnClose="OnClose"
                            OnRatioChanged="OnRatioChanged" />
        </div>
    </div>
}

@code {
    [Parameter, EditorRequired] public WsNode                           Node           { get; set; } = null!;
    [Parameter]                 public WsLeaf?                          SelectedLeaf   { get; set; }
    [Parameter]                 public bool                             ShowRing       { get; set; }
    [Parameter]                 public EventCallback<WsLeaf>            OnSelect       { get; set; }
    [Parameter]                 public EventCallback<WsLeaf>            OnOpen         { get; set; }
    [Parameter]                 public EventCallback<WsLeaf>            OnDupH         { get; set; }
    [Parameter]                 public EventCallback<WsLeaf>            OnDupV         { get; set; }
    [Parameter]                 public EventCallback<WsLeaf>            OnClose        { get; set; }
    [Parameter]                 public EventCallback<(WsSplit, double)> OnRatioChanged { get; set; }

    private ElementReference                       _containerRef;
    private DotNetObjectReference<WorkspacePanel>? _selfRef;

    [JSInvokable]
    public async Task SetRatio(double ratio)
    {
        if (Node is WsSplit split)
            await OnRatioChanged.InvokeAsync((split, Math.Clamp(ratio, 0.05, 0.95)));
    }

    private async Task OnHandleMouseDown(MouseEventArgs e, WsSplit split)
    {
        _selfRef ??= DotNetObjectReference.Create(this);
        await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("wsResizer.start",
            e.ClientX, e.ClientY,
            split.Dir == WsDir.H,
            _selfRef,
            _containerRef);
    }

    public void Dispose() => _selfRef?.Dispose();
}

    [HttpGet("topics")]

        => Ok(await _svc.GetTopicsAsync(env, ct));

    [HttpGet("topics/{topicName}/config")]
    public async Task<ActionResult<KafkaTopicConfig>> GetTopicConfig(string env, string topicName, CancellationToken ct)
        => Ok(await _svc.GetTopicConfigAsync(env, topicName, ct));

    [HttpGet("topics/{topicName}/consumergroups")]
    public async Task<ActionResult<IReadOnlyList<KafkaTopicConsumerGroup>>> GetTopicConsumerGroups(string env, string topicName, CancellationToken ct)
        => Ok(await _svc.GetTopicConsumerGroupsAsync(env, topicName, ct));
}

using NxtUI.Core.Services;
using NxtUI.Core.Models;
using NxtUI.Web.Services;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;

namespace NxtUI.Web.Controllers;

[ApiController]
[Route("api/{env}/runs")]
public class RunsController(IRunService svc) : ControllerBase
{
    [HttpGet("{runId}/details")]
    public async Task<ActionResult<RunDetails>> GetDetails(string env, string runId, CancellationToken ct)
    {
        try
        {
            var d = await svc.GetRunDetailsAsync(env, runId, ct);
            return Ok(d);
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { return BadRequest(); }
        catch (Exception) { return StatusCode(500); }
    }
}
FILE src/NxtUI.Web/Hubs/RunEventsHub.cs
LENGTH 928
using NxtUI.Core.Models;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.SignalR;

namespace NxtUI.Web.Hubs;

/// <summary>
/// SignalR hub for real-time run event streaming.
///
/// Clients call <see cref="SubscribeToRun"/> to join a group named
/// "{env}:{runId}". The server (MockRunService / MongoRunService)
/// pushes <see cref="PerformanceEvent"/> objects to that group via
/// <see cref="IHubContext{RunEventsHub}"/>.
///
/// Client-side method pushed to clients: "RunEvent" (single event upsert).
/// </summary>
public class RunEventsHub : Hub
{
    public async Task SubscribeToRun(string env, string runId) =>
        await Groups.AddToGroupAsync(Context.ConnectionId, GroupName(env, runId));

    public async Task UnsubscribeFromRun(string env, string runId) =>
        await Groups.RemoveFromGroupAsync(Context.ConnectionId, GroupName(env, runId));

    public static string GroupName(string env, string runId) => $"{env}:{runId}";
}

namespace NxtUI.Web.Hubs;

/// <summary>
/// SignalR hub for real-time run event streaming.
/// Clients subscribe to groups named "{env}:{runId}".
/// </summary>
public class RunHub : Hub
{
    public async Task SubscribeToRun(string env, string runId) =>
        await Groups.AddToGroupAsync(Context.ConnectionId, $"{env}:{runId}");

    public async Task UnsubscribeFromRun(string env, string runId) =>
        await Groups.RemoveFromGroupAsync(Context.ConnectionId, $"{env}:{runId}");
}

FILE src/NxtUI.Web/Layout/MainLayout.razor

@namespace NxtUI.Web.Layout
@inherits LayoutComponentBase
@inject ThemeService ThemeService
@inject TabService TabService
@inject NavigationManager Nav
@inject IJSRuntime JS
@implements IAsyncDisposable

<MudThemeProvider Theme="@ThemeService.Theme" IsDarkMode="@ThemeService.IsDark" />
<MudDialogProvider />
<MudSnackbarProvider />
<MudPopoverProvider />

<MudLayout>

    <Sidebar DrawerOpenChanged="OnDrawerOpenChanged" />

    <MudAppBar Elevation="0"
               Dense="true"
               Class="bm-tabbar"
               Fixed="true">
        <TabBar />
    </MudAppBar>

    <!-- Keep main content flexible; restore top offset for the fixed appbar -->
    <MudMainContent Style="padding:0; padding-top:var(--bm-tabbar-h); overflow:hidden; display:flex; flex-direction:column;">
        <div class="bm-content-area">
            <!-- Home pane: always rendered, hidden when a tab is focused. -->
            <div class="bm-content-pane @(TabService.ActiveTab is null ? "" : "bm-pane-hidden")">
                <Home />
            </div>

            <!-- One persistent pane per open tab — kept alive in the DOM so
                 polling loops, event stores, and D3 graph state survive
                 focus changes (§4 tab lifecycle). -->
            @foreach (var tab in TabService.Tabs)
            {
                <div class="bm-content-pane @(tab.IsActive ? "" : "bm-pane-hidden")" @key="tab.Id">
                    <TabContent Tab="@tab" />
                </div>
            }
        </div>
    </MudMainContent>

</MudLayout>

@code {
    // Guard flag: prevents tab→URL→tab→URL infinite loops.
    private bool _syncingFromUrl;

    private IJSObjectReference? _appModule;
    private DotNetObjectReference<MainLayout>? _dotnetRef;

    protected override void OnInitialized()
    {
        ThemeService.OnChange += StateHasChanged;
        TabService.OnChange   += OnTabsChanged;
        Nav.LocationChanged   += OnLocationChanged;

        // Open the tab that matches the initial URL (e.g. shared link / browser refresh).
        SyncTabFromUrl(Nav.Uri);
    }

    protected override async Task OnAfterRenderAsync(bool firstRender)
    {
        await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("bmSetTheme", ThemeService.IsDark);

        if (!firstRender) return;
        _appModule  = await JS.InvokeAsync<IJSObjectReference>("import", "./js/app.js?v=5");
        _dotnetRef  = DotNetObjectReference.Create(this);
        // Always register watcher — SetSystemDark is a no-op when Mode != System
        var isDark  = await _appModule.InvokeAsync<bool>("watchSystemTheme", _dotnetRef);
        ThemeService.SetSystemDark(isDark);
    }

    [JSInvokable]
    public void OnSystemThemeChanged(bool isDark) => ThemeService.SetSystemDark(isDark);

    private void OnDrawerOpenChanged(bool open) => StateHasChanged();

    // ── Tab → URL ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private void OnTabsChanged()
    {
        StateHasChanged();
        var label = TabService.ActiveTab?.Label;
        var title = string.IsNullOrEmpty(label) ? "NxtUI" : $"NxtUI : {label}";
        _ = JS.InvokeVoidAsync("bmSetTitle", title);
        if (_syncingFromUrl) return;
        if (TabService.ActiveTab?.NoNavigate == true) return;

        var targetUrl = TabService.ActiveTab?.GetUrl() ?? "/";
        var currentPath = new Uri(Nav.Uri).AbsolutePath;
        if (targetUrl != currentPath)
            Nav.NavigateTo(targetUrl);
    }

    // ── URL → Tab ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private void OnLocationChanged(object? sender, Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Routing.LocationChangedEventArgs e)
    {
        SyncTabFromUrl(e.Location);
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private void SyncTabFromUrl(string uri)
    {
        var path = new Uri(uri).AbsolutePath;
        _syncingFromUrl = true;
        try
        {
            if (path == "/")
            {
                TabService.GoHome();
            }
            else
            {
                var tab = TabModel.FromUrl(path);
                if (tab is not null)
                    TabService.OpenOrFocus(tab);
            }
        }
        finally
        {
            _syncingFromUrl = false;
        }
    }

    public async ValueTask DisposeAsync()
    {
        ThemeService.OnChange -= StateHasChanged;
        TabService.OnChange   -= OnTabsChanged;
        Nav.LocationChanged   -= OnLocationChanged;
        _dotnetRef?.Dispose();
        if (_appModule is not null)
        {
            try { await _appModule.DisposeAsync(); }
            catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
        }
    }
}

@code {
    [Parameter] public EventCallback<bool> DrawerOpenChanged { get; set; }

    private bool _drawerOpen = true;
    private IJSObjectReference? _appModule;

    private bool IsTabActive(string tabId) =>
        TabService.IsOpen(tabId) && TabService.IsActive(tabId);

    protected override void OnInitialized()
    {
        TabService.OnChange += StateHasChanged;
        EnvService.OnChange += StateHasChanged;
    }

    protected override async Task OnAfterRenderAsync(bool firstRender)
    {
        if (!firstRender) return;
        _appModule = await JS.InvokeAsync<IJSObjectReference>("import", "./js/app.js?v=5");
        var stored = await _appModule.InvokeAsync<string?>("getLocalStorage", "bm-sidebar-open");
        if (stored is not null)
        {
            _drawerOpen = stored != "false";
            await DrawerOpenChanged.InvokeAsync(_drawerOpen);
            StateHasChanged();
        }
    }

    private async Task ToggleDrawer()
    {
        _drawerOpen = !_drawerOpen;
        await DrawerOpenChanged.InvokeAsync(_drawerOpen);
        if (_appModule is not null)
            await _appModule.InvokeVoidAsync("setLocalStorage", "bm-sidebar-open", _drawerOpen.ToString().ToLower());
    }

    private void GoHome() => TabService.GoHome();
    private void Open(TabModel tab) => TabService.OpenOrFocus(tab);
    private void OnEnvChanged(string newId) => EnvService.SelectedId = newId;

    public async ValueTask DisposeAsync()
    {
        TabService.OnChange -= StateHasChanged;
        EnvService.OnChange -= StateHasChanged;
        if (_appModule is not null)
        {
            try { await _appModule.DisposeAsync(); }
            catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
        }
    }
}
FILE src/NxtUI.Web/Layout/TabBar.razor
LENGTH 4281
@namespace NxtUI.Web.Layout
@using NxtUI.Web.Models
@inject TabService TabService
@inject EnvironmentSelectorService EnvService
@inject IJSRuntime JS
@inject IDialogService DialogService
@implements IAsyncDisposable

<div class="bm-tabbar-inner">
    <div class="bm-tabs-scroll"
         role="tablist"
         aria-label="Open tabs"
         @ref="_stripRef">
        @foreach (var tab in TabService.Tabs)
        {
            var tabId = tab.Id;
            var isActive = tab.IsActive;
            var envInfo = tab.Environment is not null
                ? EnvService.Environments.FirstOrDefault(e => e.Id == tab.Environment)
                : null;

            <div class="bm-tab @(isActive ? "active" : "")"
                 @onclick="@(() => TabService.Focus(tabId))"
                 @ondblclick="@(() => RenameTabAsync(tabId, tab.Label, tab.Icon))"
                 @ondblclick:stopPropagation="true"
                 @key="tabId"
                 data-tab-id="@tabId"
                 role="tab"
                 aria-selected="@isActive"
                 draggable="true">

                <MudIcon Icon="@tab.Icon" Size="Size.Small" Class="bm-tab-icon" />
                <span class="bm-tab-label" @key="@($"{tabId}:{tab.Label}")">@tab.Label</span>

                @if (envInfo is not null)
                {
                    <span class="bm-tab-env-badge"
                          style="background:@envInfo.BadgeColor; color:@envInfo.BadgeTextColor">
                        @envInfo.Id
                    </span>
                }

                <button class="bm-tab-close-btn"
                        @onclick="@(() => TabService.Close(tabId))"
                        @onclick:stopPropagation="true"
                        aria-label="Close tab">
                    <MudIcon Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Close" Size="Size.Small" />
                </button>
            </div>
        }
    </div>
</div>

@code {
    private ElementReference _stripRef;
    private DotNetObjectReference<TabBar>? _selfRef;
    private IJSObjectReference? _appModule;

    protected override void OnInitialized() =>
        TabService.OnChange += OnTabsChanged;

    protected override async Task OnAfterRenderAsync(bool firstRender)
    {
        if (firstRender)
        {
            _selfRef = DotNetObjectReference.Create(this);
            _appModule = await JS.InvokeAsync<IJSObjectReference>("import", "./js/app.js?v=5");
            try
            {
                await _appModule.InvokeVoidAsync("initTabDrag", _stripRef, _selfRef);
                await _appModule.InvokeVoidAsync("initTabWheelScroll", _stripRef);
            }
            catch { }
        }

        // Scroll active tab into view after every render that changes tabs.
        if (_appModule is not null && TabService.ActiveTab is not null)
        {
            try
            {
                await _appModule.InvokeVoidAsync("scrollTabIntoView", TabService.ActiveTab.Id);
            }
            catch { }
        }
    }

    private void OnTabsChanged() => InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);

    private async Task RenameTabAsync(string tabId, string currentLabel, string currentIcon)
    {
        var parameters = new DialogParameters<TabRenameDialog>
        {
            { x => x.TabId,        tabId        },
            { x => x.CurrentLabel, currentLabel },
            { x => x.CurrentIcon,  currentIcon  },
        };
        var options = new DialogOptions { MaxWidth = MaxWidth.Small, CloseOnEscapeKey = true };
        var dialog = await DialogService.ShowAsync<TabRenameDialog>("Rename tab", parameters, options);
        await dialog.Result;
        await InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Called from JS on drop — commits the reorder to TabService (one
    /// server call per drag; no calls during the drag itself).
    /// </summary>
    [JSInvokable]
    public void OnTabDropped(string tabId, int targetIndex)
    {
        TabService.Reorder(tabId, targetIndex);
    }


    public async ValueTask DisposeAsync()
    {
        TabService.OnChange -= OnTabsChanged;
        _selfRef?.Dispose();
        try { if (_appModule is not null) await _appModule.DisposeAsync(); }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
    }
}

@code {
    [CascadingParameter] IMudDialogInstance MudDialog { get; set; } = default!;
    [Parameter] public string TabId        { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    [Parameter] public string CurrentLabel { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    [Parameter] public string CurrentIcon  { get; set; } = string.Empty;

    private string _name         = string.Empty;
    private string _selectedIcon = string.Empty;
    private MudTextField<string>? _field;
    private ElementReference _fieldRef;

    private static readonly (string Icon, string Label)[] _icons =
    [
        (Icons.Material.Outlined.ViewList,       "Runs"),
        (Icons.Material.Outlined.Hexagon,        "Run detail"),
        (Icons.Material.Outlined.Timeline,       "Timeline"),
        (Icons.Material.Outlined.Stream,         "Kafka"),
        (Icons.Material.Outlined.MoveToInbox,    "Topic"),
        (Icons.Material.Outlined.Groups,         "Consumers"),
        (Icons.Material.Outlined.Storage,        "MongoDB"),
        (Icons.Material.Outlined.TableChart,     "Collection"),
        (Icons.Material.Outlined.Dns,            "Services"),
        (Icons.Material.Outlined.AccountTree,    "Pipelines"),
        (Icons.Material.Outlined.Tune,           "Config"),
        (Icons.Material.Outlined.Article,        "Logs"),
        (Icons.Material.Outlined.Dashboard,      "Dashboard"),
        (Icons.Material.Outlined.Analytics,      "Analytics"),
        (Icons.Material.Outlined.TrendingUp,     "Trending"),
        (Icons.Material.Outlined.Speed,          "Performance"),
        (Icons.Material.Outlined.BugReport,      "Bug"),
        (Icons.Material.Outlined.Code,           "Code"),
        (Icons.Material.Outlined.Star,           "Star"),
        (Icons.Material.Outlined.Bookmark,       "Bookmark"),
        (Icons.Material.Outlined.Flag,           "Flag"),
        (Icons.Material.Outlined.Label,          "Label"),
        (Icons.Material.Outlined.Work,           "Work"),
        (Icons.Material.Outlined.Person,         "Person"),
        (Icons.Material.Outlined.Notifications,  "Notifications"),
        (Icons.Material.Outlined.Settings,       "Settings"),
    ];

    protected override void OnInitialized()
    {
        _name         = CurrentLabel;
        _selectedIcon = CurrentIcon;
    }

    protected override async Task OnAfterRenderAsync(bool firstRender)
    {
        if (firstRender && _field is not null)
        {
            // Use requestAnimationFrame so focus runs after the dialog open animation.
            var appModule = await JS.InvokeAsync<IJSObjectReference>("import", "./js/app.js?v=5");
            await appModule.InvokeVoidAsync("focusAfterFrame", _fieldRef);
            try { await appModule.DisposeAsync(); }
            catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
        }
    }

    private void Confirm()
    {
        var trimmed = _name?.Trim() ?? string.Empty;
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(trimmed)) return;
        TabService.RenameTab(TabId, trimmed, _selectedIcon);
        MudDialog.Close(DialogResult.Ok(true));
    }

    private void Cancel() => MudDialog.Cancel();

    private void OnKeyDown(KeyboardEventArgs e)
    {
        if (e.Key == "Enter")  Confirm();
        else if (e.Key == "Escape") Cancel();
    }
}
FILE src/NxtUI.Web/Models/TabModel.cs

namespace NxtUI.Web.Models;

public enum TabType
{
    Runs,
    Services,
    Pipelines,
    Kafka,
    MongoDB,
    Config,
    Batches,
    LogBrowser,
    Settings,
    RunDetail,
    Timeline,
    ServiceDetail,
    KafkaMessages,
    KafkaGroups,
    MongoDetail,
    LogViewer,
    LogWorkspace,
    FilterHelp,
    MemoryGraph
}

/// <summary>
/// Represents a single open tab in the tab bar.
/// </summary>
public class TabModel
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Unique identifier: "{type}:{entityId}:{env}" or "{type}:{env}" for L1 tabs.
    /// Settings has no environment: "settings".
    /// </summary>
    public string Id { get; init; } = string.Empty;

    public TabType Type { get; init; }

    /// <summary>Label shown in the tab header.</summary>
    public string Label { get; set; } = string.Empty;

    /// <summary>Environment this tab is scoped to. Null for Settings.</summary>
    public string? Environment { get; init; }

    /// <summary>Entity identifier (RunId for batch tabs, etc.). Null for L1 tabs.</summary>
    public string? EntityId { get; init; }

    /// <summary>
    /// Optional mutable navigation hint — updated on an already-open tab without changing
    /// its identity. Used e.g. by LogBrowser to navigate to a specific folder when opened
    /// from the Services page.
    /// </summary>
    public string? NavigationHint { get; set; }

    /// <summary>MudBlazor icon constant string for the tab.</summary>
    public string Icon { get; set; } = MudBlazor.Icons.Material.Outlined.Dashboard;

    public bool IsActive { get; set; }

    /// <summary>When true, opening this tab does not trigger URL navigation (e.g. browser-local files).</summary>
    public bool NoNavigate { get; set; }

    // ── Factory helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

    public static TabModel CreateRunsDashboard(string env) => new()
    {
        Id          = $"dashboard:runs:{env}",
        Type        = TabType.Runs,
        Label       = "Runs",
        Environment = env,
        Icon        = MudBlazor.Icons.Material.Outlined.ViewList
    };

    public static TabModel CreateServicesDashboard(string env) => new()
    {
        Id          = $"dashboard:services:{env}",
        Type        = TabType.Services,
        Label       = "Services",
        Environment = env,
        Icon        = MudBlazor.Icons.Material.Outlined.Dns
    };

    public static TabModel CreatePipelinesDashboard(string env) => new()
    {
        Id          = $"dashboard:pipelines:{env}",
        Type        = TabType.Pipelines,
        Label       = "Pipelines",
        Environment = env,
        Icon        = MudBlazor.Icons.Material.Outlined.AccountTree
    };

    public static TabModel CreateConfigDashboard(string env) => new()
    {
        Id          = $"dashboard:config:{env}",
        Type        = TabType.Config,
        Label       = "Config",
        Environment = env,
        Icon        = MudBlazor.Icons.Material.Outlined.Tune
    };

    public static TabModel CreateKafkaDashboard(string env) => new()
    {
        Id          = $"dashboard:kafka:{env}",
        Type        = TabType.Kafka,
        Label       = "Kafka",
        Environment = env,
        Icon        = MudBlazor.Icons.Material.Outlined.Stream
    };

    public static TabModel CreateMongoDashboard(string env) => new()
    {
        Id          = $"dashboard:mongo:{env}",
        Type        = TabType.MongoDB,
        Label       = "MongoDB",
        Environment = env,
        Icon        = MudBlazor.Icons.Material.Outlined.Storage
    };

    public static TabModel CreateMemoryGraph(string env) => new()
    {
        Id          = $"dashboard:memory:{env}",
        Type        = TabType.MemoryGraph,
        Label       = "Memory",
        Environment = env,
        Icon        = MudBlazor.Icons.Material.Outlined.Memory
    };

    public static TabModel CreateBatchesDashboard(string env) => new()
    {
        Id          = $"dashboard:batches:{env}",
        Type        = TabType.Batches,
        Label       = "Batches",
        Environment = env,
        Icon        = MudBlazor.Icons.Material.Outlined.ViewList
    };

    public static TabModel CreateLogsDashboard(string env) => new()
    {
        Id          = $"dashboard:logs:{env}",
        Type        = TabType.LogBrowser,
        Label       = "Log Browser",
        Environment = env,
        Icon        = MudBlazor.Icons.Material.Outlined.Article
    };

    public static TabModel CreateSettings() => new()
    {
        Id          = "dashboard:settings",
        Type        = TabType.Settings,
        Label       = "Settings",
        Environment = null,
        Icon        = MudBlazor.Icons.Material.Outlined.Settings
    };

    public static TabModel CreateRunDetail(string runId, string Name, string env) => new()
    {
        Id          = $"detail:run:{runId}:{env}",
        Type        = TabType.RunDetail,
        Label       = Name,
        Environment = env,
        EntityId    = runId,
        Icon        = MudBlazor.Icons.Material.Outlined.Hexagon
    };

    public static TabModel CreateTimeline(string runIds, string env) => new()
    {
        Id          = $"detail:timeline:{runIds}:{env}",
        Type        = TabType.Timeline,
        Label       = "Timeline",
        Environment = env,
        EntityId    = runIds,
        Icon        = MudBlazor.Icons.Material.Outlined.Timeline
    };

    public static TabModel CreateKafkaTopicInspector(string topicName, string env) => new()
    {
        Id          = $"detail:kafka:{topicName}:{env}",
        Type        = TabType.KafkaMessages,
        Label       = topicName.Length > 28 ? topicName[..28] + "…" : topicName,
        Environment = env,
        EntityId    = topicName,
        Icon        = MudBlazor.Icons.Material.Outlined.MoveToInbox
    };

    public static TabModel CreateKafkaGroupsDashboard(string env) => new()
    {
        Id          = $"dashboard:kafka-groups:{env}",
        Type        = TabType.KafkaGroups,
        Label       = "Consumers",
        Environment = env,
        Icon        = MudBlazor.Icons.Material.Outlined.Groups
    };

    public static TabModel CreateMongoCollectionInspector(string database, string collection, string env) => new()
    {
        Id          = $"detail:mongo:{database}:{collection}:{env}",
        Type        = TabType.MongoDetail,
        Label       = collection.Length > 24 ? collection[..24] + "…" : collection,
        Environment = env,
        EntityId    = $"{database}/{collection}",
        Icon        = MudBlazor.Icons.Material.Outlined.TableChart
    };

    public static TabModel CreateLogViewer(string path, string env) => new()
    {
        Id          = $"detail:log:{Uri.EscapeDataString(path)}:{env}",
        Type        = TabType.LogViewer,
        Label       = System.IO.Path.GetFileName(path.TrimEnd('\\')) is { Length: > 0 } n ? n : "Log",
        Environment = env,
        EntityId    = path,
        Icon        = MudBlazor.Icons.Material.Outlined.Article
    };

    public static TabModel CreateLogWorkspace(string path, string env) => new()
    {
        Id          = $"detail:workspace:{Uri.EscapeDataString(path)}:{env}",
        Type        = TabType.LogWorkspace,
        Label       = System.IO.Path.GetFileName(path.TrimEnd('\\')) is { Length: > 0 } n ? n : "Log",
        Environment = env,
        EntityId    = path,
        Icon        = MudBlazor.Icons.Material.Outlined.Article
    };

    public static TabModel CreateFilterHelp() => new()
    {
        Id   = "help:filter",
        Type = TabType.FilterHelp,
        Label = "Filter syntax",
        Icon  = MudBlazor.Icons.Material.Outlined.HelpOutline
    };

    // ── URL mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    /// <summary>Returns the canonical URL path for this tab.</summary>
    public string GetUrl() => Type switch
    {
        TabType.Runs     => $"/runs/{Environment}",
        TabType.Services    => $"/services/{Environment}",
        TabType.Pipelines   => $"/pipelines/{Environment}",
        TabType.Kafka       => $"/kafka/{Environment}",
        TabType.KafkaGroups => $"/kafka/{Environment}",
        TabType.MongoDB     => $"/mongo/{Environment}",
        TabType.Config      => $"/config/{Environment}",
        TabType.Batches     => $"/batches/{Environment}",
        TabType.MemoryGraph => $"/memory/{Environment}",
        TabType.LogBrowser        => $"/logs/{Environment}",
        TabType.LogViewer    => $"/log/{Environment}/{Uri.EscapeDataString(EntityId ?? "")}",
        TabType.LogWorkspace => $"/workspace/{Environment}/{Uri.EscapeDataString(EntityId ?? "")}",
        TabType.Settings    => "/settings",
        TabType.FilterHelp  => "/help/filter",
        TabType.RunDetail => $"/run/{Environment}/{Uri.EscapeDataString(EntityId ?? "")}",
        TabType.Timeline    => $"/timeline/{Environment}/{Uri.EscapeDataString(EntityId ?? "")}",
        TabType.KafkaMessages => $"/kafka/{Environment}/topic/{Uri.EscapeDataString(EntityId ?? "")}",
        TabType.MongoDetail => BuildMongoDetailUrl(),
        _                   => "/"
    };

    private string BuildMongoDetailUrl()
    {
        // EntityId is "database/collection" — split and encode each segment separately
        var parts = (EntityId ?? "").Split('/', 2);
        var db  = Uri.EscapeDataString(parts.Length > 0 ? parts[0] : "");
        var col = Uri.EscapeDataString(parts.Length > 1 ? parts[1] : "");
        return $"/mongo/{Environment}/{db}/{col}";
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Parses a URL path and returns the matching TabModel, or null if unrecognised.
    /// The tab is created with default label/icon — the host page updates these once data loads.
    /// </summary>
    public static TabModel? FromUrl(string path)
    {
        var parts = path.TrimStart('/').Split('/', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries);
        if (parts.Length == 0) return null;

        return parts[0].ToLowerInvariant() switch
        {
            "runs" when parts.Length >= 2
                => CreateRunsDashboard(parts[1]),

            "services" when parts.Length >= 2
                => CreateServicesDashboard(parts[1]),

            "pipelines" when parts.Length >= 2
                => CreatePipelinesDashboard(parts[1]),

            "kafka" when parts.Length == 2
                => CreateKafkaDashboard(parts[1]),

            "kafka" when parts.Length >= 4 && parts[2].Equals("topic", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                => CreateKafkaTopicInspector(Uri.UnescapeDataString(parts[3]), parts[1]),

            "mongo" when parts.Length == 2
                => CreateMongoDashboard(parts[1]),

            "mongo" when parts.Length >= 4
                => CreateMongoCollectionInspector(
                       Uri.UnescapeDataString(parts[2]),
                       Uri.UnescapeDataString(parts[3]),
                       parts[1]),

            "run" when parts.Length >= 3
                => CreateRunDetail(Uri.UnescapeDataString(parts[2]), Uri.UnescapeDataString(parts[2]), parts[1]),

            "timeline" when parts.Length >= 3
                => CreateTimeline(Uri.UnescapeDataString(parts[2]), parts[1]),

            "config" when parts.Length >= 2
                => CreateConfigDashboard(parts[1]),

            "batches" when parts.Length >= 2
                => CreateBatchesDashboard(parts[1]),

            "memory" when parts.Length >= 2
                => CreateMemoryGraph(parts[1]),

            "logs" when parts.Length >= 2
                => CreateLogsDashboard(parts[1]),

            "log" when parts.Length >= 3
                => CreateLogViewer(Uri.UnescapeDataString(parts[2]), parts[1]),

            "workspace" when parts.Length >= 3
                => CreateLogWorkspace(Uri.UnescapeDataString(parts[2]), parts[1]),

            "settings"
                => CreateSettings(),

            "help" when parts.Length >= 2 && parts[1].Equals("filter", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                => CreateFilterHelp(),

            _ => null
        };
    }
}
FILE src/NxtUI.Web/Models/WsNode.cs
LENGTH 1610
namespace NxtUI.Web.Models;

public enum WsDir { H, V }  // H = left/right, V = top/bottom

public abstract class WsNode
{
    public abstract WsLeaf? FindLeaf(Func<WsLeaf, bool> predicate);
    public abstract WsNode  Replace(WsLeaf target, WsNode replacement);
    public abstract WsNode? Remove(WsLeaf target);
}

public sealed class WsLeaf(string? path, string env = "", string? fileName = null) : WsNode
{
    public readonly Guid   Id       = Guid.NewGuid();
    public string?         Path     = path;
    public string          Env      = env;
    public string?         FileName = fileName;

    public override WsLeaf? FindLeaf(Func<WsLeaf, bool> p) => p(this) ? this : null;
    public override WsNode  Replace(WsLeaf t, WsNode r)     => ReferenceEquals(this, t) ? r : this;
    public override WsNode? Remove(WsLeaf t)                => ReferenceEquals(this, t) ? null : this;
}

public sealed class WsSplit(WsDir dir, double ratio, WsNode a, WsNode b) : WsNode
{
    public WsDir   Dir   = dir;
    public double  Ratio = ratio;   // fraction of space given to A (0..1)
    public WsNode  A     = a;
    public WsNode  B     = b;

    public override WsLeaf? FindLeaf(Func<WsLeaf, bool> p) =>
        A.FindLeaf(p) ?? B.FindLeaf(p);

    public override WsNode Replace(WsLeaf t, WsNode r) =>
        new WsSplit(Dir, Ratio, A.Replace(t, r), B.Replace(t, r));

    public override WsNode? Remove(WsLeaf t)
    {
        var na = A.Remove(t);
        var nb = B.Remove(t);
        if (na is null) return nb;
        if (nb is null) return na;
        return new WsSplit(Dir, Ratio, na, nb);
    }
}

                            <div class="bm-batch-item-meta">
                                <span class="bm-batch-item-cat">@b.Category</span>
                                <span class="bm-batch-item-params">@b.Parameters.Count param@(b.Parameters.Count != 1 ? "s" : "")</span>

                                                }
                                            </MudSelect>
                                        }
                                        else if (p.Type == "multiselect")

                                            <MudSelect T="string"
                                                       Label="@(p.Label + (p.Required ? " *" : ""))"
                                                       SelectedValues="@(_multiValues.GetValueOrDefault(pk, []))"

                                                       Variant="Variant.Outlined"
                                                       Margin="Margin.Dense"
                                                       Dense="true"
                                                       HelperText="@p.Description">
                                                @foreach (var opt in p.Options)
                                                {
                                                    <MudSelectItem T="string" Value="@opt">@opt</MudSelectItem>
                                                }
                                            </MudSelect>
                                        }
                                        else if (p.Type == "number")
                                        {
                                            <MudNumericField T="double"
                                                             Label="@(p.Label + (p.Required ? " *" : ""))"
                                                             Value="@(double.TryParse(_strValues.GetValueOrDefault(pk, "0"), System.Globalization.NumberStyles.Any, System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, out var _n) ? _n : 0d)"
                                                             ValueChanged="@((double v) => { _strValues[pk] = v.ToString(System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture); })"
                                                             Variant="Variant.Outlined"
                                                             Margin="Margin.Dense"
                                                             Min="@(p.Min ?? double.MinValue)"
                                                             Max="@(p.Max ?? double.MaxValue)"
                                                             HelperText="@p.Description" />
                                        }
                                        else
                                        {
                                            <MudTextField T="string"
                                                          Label="@(p.Label + (p.Required ? " *" : ""))"
                                                          Value="@_strValues.GetValueOrDefault(pk, "")"
                                                          ValueChanged="@(v => { _strValues[pk] = v ?? ""; })"
                                                          Variant="Variant.Outlined"
                                                          Margin="Margin.Dense"
                                                          Immediate="true"
                                                          Placeholder="@(p.Type == "date" ? "YYYY-MM-DD" : "")"
                                                          HelperText="@p.Description" />
                                        }
                                    </div>
                                }
                            </div>
