@namespace NxtUI.Web.Pages
@using NxtUI.Web.Services
@inject ILogViewerService LogViewerSvc
@inject NavigationManager Nav
@inject IJSRuntime JS
@implements IAsyncDisposable

<div class="bm-page bm-page-fill bm-lv-page" @onkeydown="OnPageKeyDown" @onkeydown:preventDefault="@_preventKey">

    <!-- ── Cell header: always visible ───────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="bm-lv-header @(IsSelected && IsMultiPane ? "bm-lv-header-selected" : "")">
        @if (OnOpen.HasDelegate)
        {
            <MudTooltip Text="Open file… (Ctrl+O)">
                <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.FolderOpen"
                               Size="Size.Small" Class="bm-lv-header-btn"
                               OnClick="@(() => OnOpen.InvokeAsync())" />
            </MudTooltip>
        }

        <MudTooltip Text="@_pathTooltip" Delay="400">
            <span class="bm-lv-header-name" @onclick="OnNameClickAsync">@_fileName</span>
        </MudTooltip>
        <span class="bm-lv-header-path">@_pathDisplay</span>

        @if (_isTailing)
        {
            <MudChip T="string" Size="Size.Small" Color="Color.Success"
                     Style="font-size:10px;height:18px;padding:0 5px;flex-shrink:0">LIVE</MudChip>
        }
        @if (_pathDisplay != "local file")
        {
            <MudTooltip Text="Copy share link (Ctrl+Shift+C)">
                <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Link"
                               Size="Size.Small" Class="bm-lv-header-btn"
                               OnClick="ShareAsync" />
            </MudTooltip>
        }
        <MudTooltip Text="Refresh (F5)">
            <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Refresh"
                           Size="Size.Small" Class="bm-lv-header-btn"
                           OnClick="RefreshAsync" Disabled="@_isLoading" />
        </MudTooltip>
        @if (OnDupH.HasDelegate)
        {
            <MudTooltip Text="Duplicate right (Ctrl+Shift+→)">
                <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.VerticalSplit"
                               Size="Size.Small" Class="bm-lv-header-btn"
                               OnClick="@(() => OnDupH.InvokeAsync())" />
            </MudTooltip>
        }
        @if (OnDupV.HasDelegate)
        {
            <MudTooltip Text="Duplicate down (Ctrl+Shift+↓)">
                <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.HorizontalSplit"
                               Size="Size.Small" Class="bm-lv-header-btn"
                               OnClick="@(() => OnDupV.InvokeAsync())" />
            </MudTooltip>
        }
        @if (OnClose.HasDelegate)
        {
            <MudTooltip Text="Close (Ctrl+W)">
                <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Close"
                               Size="Size.Small" Class="bm-lv-header-btn"
                               OnClick="@(() => OnClose.InvokeAsync())" />
            </MudTooltip>
        }
    </div>

    <!-- ── Find + filter toolbar: selected cell only ─────────────────────── -->
    <LogViewerToolbar @ref="_toolbar"
                      IsSelected="@IsSelected"
                      FindTerm="@_findTerm"
                      IsRegex="@_isRegex"
                      CaseSensitive="@_caseSensitive"
                      MatchCount="@_matchCount"
                      MatchCurrent="@_matchCurrent"
                      FilterStr="@_filterStr"
                      FilterError="@_filterError"
                      TotalCount="@_totalCount"
                      VisibleCount="@_visibleCount"
                      WordWrap="@_wordWrap"
                      FontDecreaseDisabled="@(_fontSize <= _fontSizes[0])"
                      FontIncreaseDisabled="@(_fontSize >= _fontSizes[^1])"
                      FieldHints="@LogFieldHints"
                      OnFindTermChanged="@(v => { _findTerm = v; })"
                      OnRunFind="RunFindAsync"
                      OnRegexToggled="OnRegexToggled"
                      OnCaseToggled="OnCaseToggled"
                      OnNextMatch="NextMatchAsync"
                      OnPrevMatch="PrevMatchAsync"
                      OnFilterChanged="OnFilterChangedAsync"
                      OnNextBookmark="NextBookmarkAsync"
                      OnPrevBookmark="PrevBookmarkAsync"
                      OnIncreaseFont="IncreaseFontAsync"
                      OnDecreaseFont="DecreaseFontAsync"
                      OnWrapToggled="OnWrapToggled" />

    <!-- ── Body ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    @if (_isLoading)
    {
        <MudProgressLinear Indeterminate="true" Color="Color.Primary" Style="flex-shrink:0" />
    }
    @if (_error is not null)
    {
        <div class="bm-lb-empty">
            <MudText Typo="Typo.body2" Color="Color.Error">@_error</MudText>
        </div>
    }
    <LogViewport @ref="_viewport" OnWordDoubleClicked="OnWordDoubleClickedAsync" />

</div>

@code {
    [Parameter] public string? Path       { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public string  Env        { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    [Parameter] public string? FileName   { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public bool    IsSelected  { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public bool    IsMultiPane { get; set; }

    [Parameter] public EventCallback OnOpen  { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public EventCallback OnDupH  { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public EventCallback OnDupV  { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public EventCallback OnClose { get; set; }

    private static readonly int[] _fontSizes = [11, 12, 13, 14, 15, 16];

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] LogFieldHints =
    [
        ("level, lvl",       "Log level (INFO, WARN, ERROR, DEBUG)"),
        ("host",             "Server host name"),
        ("pid",              "Process ID"),
        ("threadId, tid",    "Thread ID"),
        ("message, msg",     "Log message text"),
        ("caller",           "Caller method"),
        ("timestamp, ts",    "Timestamp"),
    ];

    private LogViewport?      _viewport;
    private LogViewerToolbar? _toolbar;

    private string? _loadedPath;
    private bool    _rendered;
    private bool    _dirty;

    private bool    _isLoading;
    private string? _error;
    private string? _rawContent;
    private string? _localKey;
    private int?    _anchorLine;
    private long    _fileOffset;

    private string  _filterStr   = "";
    private string? _filterError;
    private int     _totalCount;
    private int     _visibleCount;

    private string _findTerm      = "";
    private bool   _isRegex;
    private bool   _caseSensitive;
    private int    _matchCount;
    private int    _matchCurrent;

    private int  _fontSize = 13;
    private bool _wordWrap = false;

    private bool           _isTailing;
    private PeriodicTimer? _tailTimer;
    private CancellationTokenSource _cts = new();

    private bool _preventKey;

    private string _fileName => FileName is { Length: > 0 } fn ? fn :
        System.IO.Path.GetFileName((Path ?? "").TrimEnd('\\', '/')) is { Length: > 0 } n ? n : "Log";

    private string _pathDisplay => Path?.StartsWith("local:", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) == true
        ? "local file" : (Path ?? "");

    private string _pathTooltip => Path?.StartsWith("local:", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) == true
        ? "local file  •  Ctrl+Click to copy"
        : $"{Path}  •  Ctrl+Click to copy";

    // ── Lifecycle ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    protected override async Task OnParametersSetAsync()
    {
        if (Path == _loadedPath) return;
        _loadedPath = Path;
        _anchorLine = ParseAnchorLine(new Uri(Nav.Uri).Fragment);
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    protected override async Task OnAfterRenderAsync(bool firstRender)
    {
        _rendered = true;
        if (_dirty)
        {
            _dirty = false;
            await RenderViewerAsync();
        }
    }

    private async Task OnWordDoubleClickedAsync(string word)
    {
        _findTerm = word;
        await RunFindAsync();
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private async Task OnNameClickAsync(MouseEventArgs e)
    {
        if (!e.CtrlKey) return;
        var text = Path?.StartsWith("local:", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) == true
            ? Path["local:".Length..]
            : (Path ?? "");
        await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("copyText", text, "Copied to clipboard");
    }

    private async Task OnPageKeyDown(KeyboardEventArgs e)
    {
        _preventKey = false;
        var k = e.Key;

        // ── Cell controls ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
        // Ctrl+O — open
        if (e.CtrlKey && !e.ShiftKey && !e.AltKey && k == "o" && OnOpen.HasDelegate)
            { _preventKey = true; await OnOpen.InvokeAsync(); return; }

        // Ctrl+W — close
        if (e.CtrlKey && !e.ShiftKey && !e.AltKey && k == "w" && OnClose.HasDelegate)
            { _preventKey = true; await OnClose.InvokeAsync(); return; }

        // F5 — refresh
        if (!e.CtrlKey && !e.AltKey && k == "F5")
            { _preventKey = true; await RefreshAsync(); return; }

        // Ctrl+Shift+→ — duplicate right
        if (e.CtrlKey && e.ShiftKey && k == "ArrowRight" && OnDupH.HasDelegate)
            { _preventKey = true; await OnDupH.InvokeAsync(); return; }

        // Ctrl+Shift+↓ — duplicate down
        if (e.CtrlKey && e.ShiftKey && k == "ArrowDown" && OnDupV.HasDelegate)
            { _preventKey = true; await OnDupV.InvokeAsync(); return; }

        // Ctrl+Shift+C — share link
        if (e.CtrlKey && e.ShiftKey && k == "C")
            { _preventKey = true; await ShareAsync(); return; }

        // ── Find / filter ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
        // Ctrl+F — focus find
        if (e.CtrlKey && !e.ShiftKey && !e.AltKey && k == "f")
        {
            _preventKey = true;
            if (_toolbar is not null) await _toolbar.FocusFindAsync();
            return;
        }
        // Ctrl+G — focus filter
        if (e.CtrlKey && !e.ShiftKey && !e.AltKey && k == "g")
        {
            _preventKey = true;
            if (_toolbar is not null) await _toolbar.FocusFilterAsync();
            return;
        }
        // F3 — next match
        if (!e.CtrlKey && !e.AltKey && !e.ShiftKey && k == "F3")
            { _preventKey = true; await NextMatchAsync(); return; }

        // Shift+F3 — previous match
        if (!e.CtrlKey && !e.AltKey && e.ShiftKey && k == "F3")
            { _preventKey = true; await PrevMatchAsync(); return; }

        // Alt+R — toggle regex
        if (!e.CtrlKey && e.AltKey && !e.ShiftKey && k == "r")
            { _preventKey = true; await OnRegexToggled(!_isRegex); return; }

        // Alt+C — toggle case sensitive
        if (!e.CtrlKey && e.AltKey && !e.ShiftKey && k == "c")
            { _preventKey = true; await OnCaseToggled(!_caseSensitive); return; }

        // ── Bookmarks ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
        // F2 — next bookmark
        if (!e.CtrlKey && !e.AltKey && !e.ShiftKey && k == "F2")
            { _preventKey = true; await NextBookmarkAsync(); return; }

        // Shift+F2 — previous bookmark
        if (!e.CtrlKey && !e.AltKey && e.ShiftKey && k == "F2")
            { _preventKey = true; await PrevBookmarkAsync(); return; }

        // ── Display ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
        // Ctrl+= or Ctrl++ — increase font
        if (e.CtrlKey && !e.AltKey && (k == "=" || k == "+"))
            { _preventKey = true; await IncreaseFontAsync(); return; }

        // Ctrl+- or Ctrl+_ — decrease font
        if (e.CtrlKey && !e.AltKey && (k == "-" || k == "_"))
            { _preventKey = true; await DecreaseFontAsync(); return; }

        // Alt+Z — word wrap
        if (!e.CtrlKey && e.AltKey && !e.ShiftKey && k == "z")
            { _preventKey = true; await OnWrapToggled(!_wordWrap); return; }
    }

    // ── File loading ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Path)) return;
        _isLoading = true;
        _error     = null;
        StopTail();
        StateHasChanged();

        try
        {
            if (Path!.StartsWith("local:", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                _localKey   = Path["local:".Length..];
                _rawContent = null;
                _fileOffset = 0;
            }
            else
            {
                _localKey = null;
                (_rawContent, _fileOffset) = await LogViewerSvc.ReadAllAsync(Path!, _cts.Token);
            }
            _dirty = true;
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { }
        catch (Exception ex) { _error = ex.Message; }
        finally
        {
            _isLoading = false;
            StateHasChanged();
        }
    }

    private async Task RenderViewerAsync()
    {
        if (_viewport is null) return;
        if (_rawContent is null && _localKey is null) return;
        if (!_rendered) return;

        var opts = new { anchorLine = _anchorLine, fontSize = _fontSize, wordWrap = _wordWrap };
        if (_localKey is not null)
        {
            await _viewport.RenderLocalFileAsync(_localKey, opts);
            _localKey = null;
        }
        else
        {
            await _viewport.RenderAsync(_rawContent!, opts);
            _rawContent = null;
            StartTail();
        }
    }

    private async Task RefreshAsync()
    {
        _loadedPath = null;
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    // ── Find ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task RunFindAsync()
    {
        if (_viewport is null) return;
        var result = await _viewport.FindAsync(_findTerm,
            new { isRegex = _isRegex, caseSensitive = _caseSensitive });
        _matchCount   = result.Count;
        _matchCurrent = result.Current;
    }

    private async Task NextMatchAsync()
    {
        if (_viewport is null) return;
        var result = await _viewport.NextMatchAsync();
        _matchCount   = result.Count;
        _matchCurrent = result.Current;
    }

    private async Task PrevMatchAsync()
    {
        if (_viewport is null) return;
        var result = await _viewport.PrevMatchAsync();
        _matchCount   = result.Count;
        _matchCurrent = result.Current;
    }

    private async Task OnRegexToggled(bool val)  { _isRegex       = val; await RunFindAsync(); }
    private async Task OnCaseToggled(bool val)   { _caseSensitive = val; await RunFindAsync(); }

    // ── Filter ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task OnFilterChangedAsync(string expr)
    {
        _filterStr   = expr;
        _filterError = null;
        if (_viewport is null) return;
        try
        {
            var result    = await _viewport.SetFilterAsync(expr);
            _totalCount   = result.Total;
            _visibleCount = result.Visible;
        }
        catch (Exception ex) { _filterError = ex.Message; }
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    // ── Bookmarks ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task PrevBookmarkAsync() { if (_viewport is not null) await _viewport.PrevBookmarkAsync(); }
    private async Task NextBookmarkAsync() { if (_viewport is not null) await _viewport.NextBookmarkAsync(); }

    // ── Display controls ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task DecreaseFontAsync()
    {
        var idx = Array.IndexOf(_fontSizes, _fontSize);
        if (idx > 0) { _fontSize = _fontSizes[idx - 1]; await _viewport!.SetFontSizeAsync(_fontSize); }
    }

    private async Task IncreaseFontAsync()
    {
        var idx = Array.IndexOf(_fontSizes, _fontSize);
        if (idx < _fontSizes.Length - 1) { _fontSize = _fontSizes[idx + 1]; await _viewport!.SetFontSizeAsync(_fontSize); }
    }

    private async Task OnWrapToggled(bool val)
    {
        _wordWrap = val;
        if (_viewport is not null) await _viewport.SetWordWrapAsync(val);
    }

    // ── Share link ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task ShareAsync()
    {
        if (_viewport is null) return;
        try
        {
            var lineIdx  = await _viewport.GetCurrentTopLineAsync();
            var baseUrl  = Nav.Uri.Split('#')[0];
            var shareUrl = $"{baseUrl}#L{lineIdx + 1}";
            await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("copyText", shareUrl, "Share link copied");
        }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
    }

    // ── Live tail ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private void StartTail()
    {
        _isTailing = true;
        _tailTimer = new PeriodicTimer(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(10));
        _ = TailLoopAsync();
    }

    private void StopTail()
    {
        _isTailing = false;
        _tailTimer?.Dispose();
        _tailTimer = null;
    }

    private async Task TailLoopAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            while (_tailTimer is not null && await _tailTimer.WaitForNextTickAsync(_cts.Token))
                await InvokeAsync(TailTickAsync);
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { }
    }

    private async Task TailTickAsync()
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Path) || _viewport is null) return;
        try
        {
            var (text, newOffset) = LogViewerSvc.ReadDelta(Path!, _fileOffset);
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(text)) return;
            _fileOffset = newOffset;
            await _viewport.AppendRawAsync(text);
        }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
        catch { }
    }

    // ── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private static int? ParseAnchorLine(string fragment)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(fragment)) return null;
        var frag = fragment.TrimStart('#');
        if (frag.StartsWith("L", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            && int.TryParse(frag[1..], out var line) && line > 0)
            return line - 1;
        return null;
    }

    public async ValueTask DisposeAsync()
    {
        StopTail();
        await _cts.CancelAsync();
        _cts.Dispose();
        if (_viewport is not null) await _viewport.DisposeAsync();
    }
}
FILE src/NxtUI.Web/Pages/LogWorkspace.razor
LENGTH 3964
@namespace NxtUI.Web.Pages
@using NxtUI.Web.Models
@using NxtUI.Web.Components
@inject IDialogService DialogService
@inject TabService TabService

<div class="bm-page bm-page-fill" style="overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;">
    <WorkspacePanel Node="@_root"
                    SelectedLeaf="@_selected"
                    ShowRing="@(_root is not WsLeaf)"
                    OnSelect="OnSelect"
                    OnOpen="OnOpen"
                    OnDupH="OnDupH"
                    OnDupV="OnDupV"
                    OnClose="OnClose"
                    OnRatioChanged="OnRatioChanged" />
</div>

@code {
    [Parameter] public string? Path     { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public string  Env      { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    [Parameter] public string? FileName { get; set; }

    private WsNode  _root     = null!;
    private WsLeaf? _selected;

    private static readonly DialogOptions _dialogOpts = new()
    {
        CloseButton      = true,
        MaxWidth         = MaxWidth.Small,
        FullWidth        = false,
        CloseOnEscapeKey = true,
        BackdropClick    = true,
    };

    protected override void OnInitialized()
    {
        var leaf  = new WsLeaf(Path, Env, FileName);
        _root     = leaf;
        _selected = leaf;
    }

    private void OnSelect(WsLeaf leaf) { _selected = leaf; StateHasChanged(); }

    private async Task OnOpen(WsLeaf leaf)
    {
        _selected = leaf;
        var dialog = await DialogService.ShowAsync<OpenLogFileDialog>("Open log file", _dialogOpts);
        var result = await dialog.Result;
        if (result is null || result.Canceled) return;

        var (path, placement) = ((string, OpenLogFileDialog.WsPlacement))result.Data!;
        var fileName = System.IO.Path.GetFileName(path.TrimEnd('\\', '/')) is { Length: > 0 } n ? n : path;

        switch (placement)
        {
            case OpenLogFileDialog.WsPlacement.Replace:
                leaf.Path     = path;
                leaf.FileName = fileName;
                break;

            case OpenLogFileDialog.WsPlacement.Left:
            case OpenLogFileDialog.WsPlacement.Top:
            {
                var dir     = placement == OpenLogFileDialog.WsPlacement.Left ? WsDir.H : WsDir.V;
                var newLeaf = new WsLeaf(path, leaf.Env, fileName);
                _root       = _root.Replace(leaf, new WsSplit(dir, 0.5, newLeaf, leaf));
                _selected   = newLeaf;
                break;
            }

            case OpenLogFileDialog.WsPlacement.Right:
            case OpenLogFileDialog.WsPlacement.Bottom:
            {
                var dir     = placement == OpenLogFileDialog.WsPlacement.Right ? WsDir.H : WsDir.V;
                var newLeaf = new WsLeaf(path, leaf.Env, fileName);
                _root       = _root.Replace(leaf, new WsSplit(dir, 0.5, leaf, newLeaf));
                _selected   = newLeaf;
                break;
            }
        }
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private void OnDupH(WsLeaf leaf) => Duplicate(leaf, WsDir.H);
    private void OnDupV(WsLeaf leaf) => Duplicate(leaf, WsDir.V);

    private void Duplicate(WsLeaf leaf, WsDir dir)
    {
        var clone = new WsLeaf(leaf.Path, leaf.Env, leaf.FileName);
        _root     = _root.Replace(leaf, new WsSplit(dir, 0.5, leaf, clone));
        _selected = clone;
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private void OnClose(WsLeaf leaf)
    {
        if (_root is WsLeaf)
        {
            if (TabService.ActiveTab is { } tab) TabService.Close(tab.Id);
            return;
        }
        var sibling = _root.FindLeaf(l => !ReferenceEquals(l, leaf));
        var next    = _root.Remove(leaf);
        if (next is null) return;
        _root     = next;
        _selected = sibling;
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private void OnRatioChanged((WsSplit split, double ratio) args)
    {
        args.split.Ratio = args.ratio;
        StateHasChanged();
    }
}

@namespace NxtUI.Web.Pages
@using NxtUI.Web.Models
@using NxtUI.Web.Services
@using NxtUI.Logging
@inject IHeartbeatService HeartbeatSvc
@inject IServiceMetricsMonitor MetricsMonitor
@inject IJSRuntime JS
@implements IAsyncDisposable

<div class="bm-page bm-page-fill bm-mg-page">

    <!-- ── Toolbar ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="bm-batch-toolbar bm-mg-toolbar">

        <!-- Grouping -->
        <span class="bm-svc-grouping-label">Group</span>
        <MudButtonGroup Size="Size.Small" Variant="Variant.Outlined" Class="bm-svc-group-toggle">
            <MudButton Class="@(_groupBy == GroupBy.None    ? "bm-view-btn-active" : "bm-view-btn-inactive")" OnClick="@(() => SetGroupBy(GroupBy.None))">None</MudButton>
            <MudButton Class="@(_groupBy == GroupBy.Service ? "bm-view-btn-active" : "bm-view-btn-inactive")" OnClick="@(() => SetGroupBy(GroupBy.Service))">Service</MudButton>
            <MudButton Class="@(_groupBy == GroupBy.Host    ? "bm-view-btn-active" : "bm-view-btn-inactive")" OnClick="@(() => SetGroupBy(GroupBy.Host))">Host</MudButton>
        </MudButtonGroup>

        <div class="bm-mg-toolbar-sep"></div>

        <!-- Chart type -->
        <span class="bm-svc-grouping-label">Chart</span>
        <MudButtonGroup Size="Size.Small" Variant="Variant.Outlined" Class="bm-svc-group-toggle">
            <MudButton Class="@(_chartType == ChartType.Line     ? "bm-view-btn-active" : "bm-view-btn-inactive")" OnClick="@(() => SetChartType(ChartType.Line))">Line</MudButton>
            <MudButton Class="@(_chartType == ChartType.Sunburst ? "bm-view-btn-active" : "bm-view-btn-inactive")" OnClick="@(() => SetChartType(ChartType.Sunburst))">Sunburst</MudButton>
        </MudButtonGroup>

        <div class="bm-mg-toolbar-spacer"></div>

        @if (_lastUpdated.HasValue)
        {
            <span class="bm-toolbar-hint">Updated @_lastUpdated.Value.ToLocalTime().ToString("HH:mm:ss")</span>
        }
    </div>

    <!-- ── Body: legend panel + chart ────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="bm-mg-body">

        <!-- Legend / filter panel -->
        <div class="bm-mg-legend">
            <div class="bm-mg-legend-title">@LegendTitle</div>
            @foreach (var item in _legendItems)
            {
                <label class="bm-mg-legend-item">
                    <input type="checkbox"
                           checked="@item.Visible"
                           @onchange="@(e => ToggleLegendItem(item, (bool)(e.Value ?? false)))" />
                    <span class="bm-mg-legend-dot" style="background:@item.Color"></span>
                    <span class="bm-mg-legend-label" title="@item.Name">@item.Name</span>
                    <span class="bm-mg-legend-value">@FormatMb(item.CurrentMb)</span>
                </label>
            }
        </div>

        <!-- Chart area -->
        <div class="bm-mg-chart-area">
            <div class="bm-mg-d3-container" @ref="_chartRef"></div>
            @if (_chartType == ChartType.Line && _lineSeries.Count == 0)
            {
                <div class="bm-mg-empty">No data yet.</div>
            }
        </div>

    </div>
</div>

@code {
    [Parameter] public string Env { get; set; } = string.Empty;

    // ── enums ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    private enum GroupBy   { None, Service, Host }
    private enum ChartType { Line, Sunburst }

    // ── state ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    private GroupBy   _groupBy   = GroupBy.Service;
    private ChartType _chartType = ChartType.Line;

    private IDisposable?         _subscription;
    private DateTime?            _lastUpdated;
    private List<ServiceStatus>  _services = [];

    private sealed class LegendItem
    {
        public string  Key       { get; init; } = "";   // grouping key
        public string  Name      { get; init; } = "";
        public string  Color     { get; init; } = "#888";
        public bool    Visible   { get; set;  } = true;
        public double  CurrentMb { get; set;  }
    }

    private List<LegendItem>    _legendItems = [];
    private List<LineSeriesDto> _lineSeries  = [];
    private ElementReference    _chartRef;
    private bool                _chartDirty  = true;

    private sealed record LineSeriesDto(string Name, string Color, double[] Data, string[] Labels);

    // 16-color palette
    private static readonly string[] Palette =
    [
        "#4e79a7","#f28e2b","#e15759","#76b7b2","#59a14f",
        "#edc948","#b07aa1","#ff9da7","#9c755f","#bab0ac",
        "#d37295","#fabfd2","#8cd17d","#86bcb6","#499894","#a0cbe8"
    ];

    // ── lifecycle ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    protected override void OnInitialized()
    {
        _subscription = MetricsMonitor.Subscribe(Env);
        MetricsMonitor.OnMetricsUpdated += OnMetricsUpdated;
    }

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        _services = await HeartbeatSvc.GetServiceStatusesAsync(Env);
        Rebuild();
    }

    protected override async Task OnAfterRenderAsync(bool firstRender)
    {
        if (_chartDirty)
        {
            _chartDirty = false;
            if (_chartType == ChartType.Sunburst)
                await RenderSunburstAsync();
            else
                await RenderLineAsync();
        }
    }

    private void OnMetricsUpdated(string env)
    {
        if (env != Env) return;
        _ = InvokeAsync(async () =>
        {
            _services = await HeartbeatSvc.GetServiceStatusesAsync(Env);
            Rebuild();
            StateHasChanged();
        });
    }

    // ── grouping / chart type ─────────────────────────────────────────────

    private void SetGroupBy(GroupBy g)
    {
        _groupBy = g;
        Rebuild();
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private void SetChartType(ChartType t)
    {
        _chartType = t;
        _chartDirty = true;
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private void ToggleLegendItem(LegendItem item, bool visible)
    {
        item.Visible = visible;
        BuildChartData();
        _chartDirty = true;
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    // ── data building ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private void Rebuild()
    {
        _lastUpdated = DateTime.UtcNow;
        var services = _services;

        // Build legend items keyed by group
        var groups = GroupServices(services);
        var prevVisibility = _legendItems.ToDictionary(i => i.Key, i => i.Visible);

        _legendItems = groups.Select((kv, idx) =>
        {
            var color = Palette[idx % Palette.Length];
            var mb    = kv.Value.Sum(s => GetCurrentMb(s));
            return new LegendItem
            {
                Key       = kv.Key,
                Name      = kv.Key,
                Color     = color,
                CurrentMb = mb,
                Visible   = prevVisibility.TryGetValue(kv.Key, out var v) ? v : true
            };
        }).ToList();

        BuildChartData();
        _chartDirty = true;
    }

    private Dictionary<string, List<ServiceStatus>> GroupServices(IEnumerable<ServiceStatus> services)
    {
        var result = new Dictionary<string, List<ServiceStatus>>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
        foreach (var svc in services)
        {
            var key = _groupBy switch
            {
                GroupBy.Host    => svc.HostName,
                GroupBy.Service => svc.ServiceName,
                _               => svc.ServiceName + "|" + svc.ProcessId   // None = individual
            };
            if (!result.TryGetValue(key, out var list))
                result[key] = list = [];
            list.Add(svc);
        }
        return result;
    }

    private void BuildChartData()
    {
        var services  = _services;
        var groups    = GroupServices(services);
        var colorMap  = _legendItems.ToDictionary(i => i.Key, i => i.Color);
        var visible   = _legendItems.Where(i => i.Visible).Select(i => i.Key).ToHashSet(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

        // Line chart: build one series per visible group, aligned on a shared time axis
        BuildLineData(groups, colorMap, visible);
    }

    private void BuildLineData(
        Dictionary<string, List<ServiceStatus>> groups,
        Dictionary<string, string> colorMap,
        HashSet<string> visible)
    {
        // Collect all histories to find the global time range
        var allSamples = new List<(string key, MetricsSample sample)>();
        foreach (var (key, svcs) in groups)
        {
            if (!visible.Contains(key)) continue;
            foreach (var svc in svcs)
            {
                var hist = MetricsMonitor.GetHistory(Env, svc);
                allSamples.AddRange(hist.Select(s => (key, s)));
            }
        }

        if (allSamples.Count == 0) { _lineSeries = []; return; }

        // Shared time axis — up to 120 buckets
        var minTime  = allSamples.Min(x => x.sample.Timestamp);
        var maxTime  = allSamples.Max(x => x.sample.Timestamp);
        var span     = maxTime - minTime;
        int buckets  = Math.Clamp((int)span.TotalMinutes + 1, 2, 120);
        var interval = span.TotalSeconds / (buckets - 1);
        if (interval < 1) interval = 1;

        var times = Enumerable.Range(0, buckets)
            .Select(i => minTime.AddSeconds(i * interval))
            .ToArray();

        var labels = times.Select((t, i) =>
            i % Math.Max(1, buckets / 10) == 0
                ? t.ToLocalTime().ToString("HH:mm")
                : "").ToArray();

        _lineSeries = [];
        foreach (var (key, svcs) in groups)
        {
            if (!visible.Contains(key)) continue;
            var history = svcs.SelectMany(svc => MetricsMonitor.GetHistory(Env, svc)).ToList();
            if (history.Count == 0) continue;

            var data = new double[buckets];
            for (int i = 0; i < buckets; i++)
            {
                var t    = times[i];
                var prev = history.Where(s => s.Timestamp <= t).MaxBy(s => s.Timestamp);
                data[i]  = prev is not null ? prev.TotalCurrentBytes / 1e6 : 0;
            }

            var color = colorMap.TryGetValue(key, out var c) ? c : "#888";
            _lineSeries.Add(new LineSeriesDto(key, color, data, labels));
        }
    }

    // ── sunburst ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task RenderLineAsync()
    {
        try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("memoryLineChart.render", _chartRef, _lineSeries); }
        catch { }
    }

    private async Task RenderSunburstAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            var data = BuildSunburstData();
            await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("memorySunburst.render", _chartRef, data, new { });
        }
        catch { }
    }

    private object BuildSunburstData()
    {
        var services = _services;
        var groups   = GroupServices(services);
        var visible  = _legendItems.Where(i => i.Visible).Select(i => i.Key).ToHashSet(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
        var colorMap = _legendItems.ToDictionary(i => i.Key, i => i.Color);

        var groupObjects = new List<object>();

        foreach (var (key, svcs) in groups)
        {
            if (!visible.Contains(key)) continue;
            var color = colorMap.TryGetValue(key, out var c) ? c : "#888";

            if (_groupBy == GroupBy.None)
            {
                // Each entry = one service; split into main + child process
                foreach (var svc in svcs)
                {
                    var latest = MetricsMonitor.GetLatest(Env, svc);
                    if (latest is null) continue;

                    var mainBytes  = latest.CurrentUsageBytes;
                    var childBytes = latest.ChildUsageBytes;
                    var children   = new List<object>();

                    if (mainBytes > 0)
                        children.Add(new { name = svc.ServiceName + " (main)", value = mainBytes, color });

                    if (childBytes > 0)
                    {
                        var childColor = AdjustBrightness(color, 0.65);
                        children.Add(new { name = svc.ProcessId + "+ (child)", value = childBytes, color = childColor });
                    }

                    if (children.Count == 0) continue;
                    var total = mainBytes + childBytes;
                    groupObjects.Add(new { name = key, value = total, color, children });
                }
            }
            else
            {
                // Aggregate across all svcs in this group
                long totalBytes = 0;
                var children = new List<object>();
                int ci = 0;
                foreach (var svc in svcs)
                {
                    var latest = MetricsMonitor.GetLatest(Env, svc);
                    if (latest is null) continue;
                    var bytes = latest.TotalCurrentBytes;
                    if (bytes == 0) continue;
                    totalBytes += bytes;
                    var childColor = ShiftHue(color, ci++ * 20);
                    var childLabel = _groupBy == GroupBy.Host ? svc.ServiceName : svc.HostName;
                    children.Add(new { name = childLabel, value = bytes, color = childColor });
                }
                if (totalBytes == 0) continue;
                groupObjects.Add(new { name = key, value = totalBytes, color, children });
            }
        }

        var grandTotal = groupObjects.Sum(g => (long)((dynamic)g).value);
        return new { total = grandTotal, groups = groupObjects };
    }

    // ── helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private string LegendTitle => _groupBy switch
    {
        GroupBy.Host    => "Hosts",
        GroupBy.Service => "Services",
        _               => "Processes"
    };

    private double GetCurrentMb(ServiceStatus svc)
    {
        var s = MetricsMonitor.GetLatest(Env, svc);
        return s is not null ? s.TotalCurrentBytes / 1e6 : (svc.RamMb ?? 0);
    }

    private static string FormatMb(double mb)
        => mb >= 1000 ? $"{mb / 1024.0:F1} GB" : $"{mb:F0} MB";

    // Very rough HSL hue shift for child items — keeps visual relationship to parent color.
    private static string ShiftHue(string hex, int degrees)
    {
        if (!TryParseHex(hex, out var r, out var g, out var b)) return hex;
        RgbToHsl(r, g, b, out var h, out var s, out var l);
        h = ((h * 360 + degrees) % 360) / 360.0;
        HslToRgb(h, s, l, out var nr, out var ng, out var nb);
        return $"#{nr:X2}{ng:X2}{nb:X2}";
    }

    private static string AdjustBrightness(string hex, double factor)
    {
        if (!TryParseHex(hex, out var r, out var g, out var b)) return hex;
        return $"#{Clamp255(r * factor):X2}{Clamp255(g * factor):X2}{Clamp255(b * factor):X2}";
    }

    private static bool TryParseHex(string hex, out int r, out int g, out int b)
    {
        r = g = b = 0;
        hex = hex.TrimStart('#');
        if (hex.Length != 6) return false;
        r = Convert.ToInt32(hex[..2], 16);
        g = Convert.ToInt32(hex[2..4], 16);
        b = Convert.ToInt32(hex[4..6], 16);
        return true;
    }

    private static int Clamp255(double v) => Math.Clamp((int)Math.Round(v), 0, 255);

    private static void RgbToHsl(int r, int g, int b, out double h, out double s, out double l)
    {
        double rf = r / 255.0, gf = g / 255.0, bf = b / 255.0;
        double max = Math.Max(rf, Math.Max(gf, bf));
        double min = Math.Min(rf, Math.Min(gf, bf));
        l = (max + min) / 2;
        if (max == min) { h = s = 0; return; }
        double d = max - min;
        s = l > 0.5 ? d / (2 - max - min) : d / (max + min);
        h = max == rf ? (gf - bf) / d + (gf < bf ? 6 : 0) :
            max == gf ? (bf - rf) / d + 2 :
                        (rf - gf) / d + 4;
        h /= 6;
    }

    private static void HslToRgb(double h, double s, double l, out int r, out int g, out int b)
    {
        if (s == 0) { r = g = b = Clamp255(l * 255); return; }
        double q = l < 0.5 ? l * (1 + s) : l + s - l * s;
        double p = 2 * l - q;
        r = Clamp255(Hue(p, q, h + 1.0 / 3) * 255);
        g = Clamp255(Hue(p, q, h)           * 255);
        b = Clamp255(Hue(p, q, h - 1.0 / 3) * 255);
    }

    private static double Hue(double p, double q, double t)
    {
        if (t < 0) t += 1; if (t > 1) t -= 1;
        return t < 1.0 / 6 ? p + (q - p) * 6 * t :
               t < 0.5     ? q :
               t < 2.0 / 3 ? p + (q - p) * (2.0 / 3 - t) * 6 : p;
    }

    // ── disposal ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    public async ValueTask DisposeAsync()
    {
        MetricsMonitor.OnMetricsUpdated -= OnMetricsUpdated;
        _subscription?.Dispose();
        try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("memorySunburst.destroy", _chartRef); }
        catch { }
    }
}

namespace NxtUI.Web.Pages;

public partial class MongoCollectionInfoDialog
{
    private static string FormatBytes(long b) => b switch
    {
        < 1024                => $"{b} B",
        < 1024 * 1024         => $"{b / 1024} KB",
        < 1024L * 1024 * 1024 => $"{b / (1024 * 1024)} MB",
        _                     => $"{b / (1024L * 1024 * 1024)} GB",
    };
}

@namespace NxtUI.Web.Pages
@using NxtUI.Core.Models
@using NxtUI.Core.Services
@using NxtUI.Filtering
@inject IMongoReader MongoSvc
@inject IJSRuntime JS
@implements IDisposable

<div class="bm-page bm-page-fill bm-inspector">

    <!-- Toolbar -->
    <div class="bm-batch-toolbar">
        <span class="bm-inspector-topic">
            <MudIcon Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.TableChart" Size="Size.Small" Class="bm-inspector-topic-icon" />
            @_database.<span style="opacity:.5;">@_collection</span>
        </span>

        <FilterBox Value="@_search"
                   OnFilterChanged="OnSearchChanged"
                   ParseError="@_filterParseError"
                   Placeholder="Search documents…"
                   Class="bm-filter-input"
                   FieldHints="@_fieldHints" />

        <MudTooltip Text="Refresh">
            <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Refresh"
                           Size="Size.Small"
                           Disabled="_loading"
                           OnClick="@(() => LoadAsync())"
                           Class="bm-refresh-btn" />

        <div class="bm-table-wrap">

                </HeaderContent>
                <RowTemplate>

                        <span class="bm-kafka-mono bm-mongo-id">@context.Id</span>
                    </MudTd>
                    <MudTd Style="width:100%;" @ondblclick="@(() => SaveDocumentAsync(context))">
                        <span class="bm-inspector-preview">@TruncateJson(context.Json)</span>

                        {
                            <span>&nbsp;·&nbsp; @_selected.Timestamp.Value.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss") UTC</span>
                        }
                    </span>

@code {
    [Parameter] public string EntityId    { get; set; } = string.Empty;  // "database/collection"
    [Parameter] public string Environment { get; set; } = string.Empty;

    private string _database   = string.Empty;
    private string _collection = string.Empty;

    private List<MongoDocument> _docs       = new();
    private MongoDocument?      _selected   = null;
    private ElementReference    _jsonRef;
    private ElementReference    _detailRef;
    private DotNetObjectReference<MongoCollectionInspector>? _selfRef;
    private double              _detailWidth = 380;
    private bool                _jsonDirty;
    private string              _search     = string.Empty;
    private string?             _filterParseError = null;
    private bool                _loading    = true;
    private long                _totalCount = 0;
    private int                 _page = 1, _pageSize = 25, _totalPages = 1;
    private string              _sortField  = "_id";
    private bool                _sortDesc   = false;
    private CancellationTokenSource _cts = new();

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] _fieldHints =
    [
        ("plain text",   "searches _id (e.g. abc123)"),
        ("field:value",  "case-insensitive regex on any field (e.g. status:active, name:foo*)"),
        ("field:>100",   "numeric or date comparison (e.g. amount:>100, createdAt:>-7d, price:10..50)"),
        ("{ … }",        "raw MongoDB query — any operator works: $gt, $in, $exists, $elemMatch, $or, aggregation expressions, etc. (e.g. {\"status\":{\"$in\":[\"A\",\"B\"]},\"n\":{\"$gt\":5}})"),
    ];

    protected override async Task OnParametersSetAsync()
    {
        var parts   = EntityId.Split('/', 2);
        _database   = parts.Length > 0 ? parts[0] : string.Empty;
        _collection = parts.Length > 1 ? parts[1] : string.Empty;
        _page       = 1;
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        _cts.Cancel();
        _cts = new CancellationTokenSource();
        var ct = _cts.Token;

        _loading = true;
        StateHasChanged();
        try
        {
            var skip = (_page - 1) * _pageSize;
            var (docs, total) = await MongoSvc.GetDocumentsAsync(
                Environment, _database, _collection,
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_search) ? null : _search,
                skip, _pageSize, _sortField, _sortDesc, ct);
            _docs       = docs.ToList();
            _totalCount = total;
            _totalPages = Math.Max(1, (int)Math.Ceiling(total / (double)_pageSize));
            _page       = Math.Clamp(_page, 1, _totalPages);
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { return; }
        finally { _loading = false; }

        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private void OnSearchChanged(string s)
    {
        _search = s;
        _filterParseError = null;
        _page = 1;
        _ = LoadAsync();
    }

    private void SetSort(string field)
    {
        if (_sortField == field) _sortDesc = !_sortDesc;
        else { _sortField = field; _sortDesc = false; }
        _page = 1;
        _ = LoadAsync();
    }

    private string SortIcon(string field) =>
        _sortField != field ? "" : _sortDesc ? " ▼" : " ▲";

    private void OnPageChanged(int p) { _page = p; _ = LoadAsync(); }
    private void OnPageSizeChanged(int s) { _pageSize = s; _page = 1; _ = LoadAsync(); }

    private void OnRowSelected(MongoDocument? doc)
    {
        _selected  = ReferenceEquals(_selected, doc) ? null : doc;
        _jsonDirty = _selected is not null;
    }

    private async Task OnResizerMouseDown(MouseEventArgs e)
    {
        _selfRef ??= DotNetObjectReference.Create(this);
        await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("bmInspectorResizer.start", e.ClientX, _selfRef, _detailRef);
    }

    [JSInvokable]
    public void SetDetailWidth(double w) => _detailWidth = Math.Clamp(w, 250, 900);

    protected override async Task OnAfterRenderAsync(bool firstRender)
    {
        if (_jsonDirty && _selected is not null)
        {
            _jsonDirty = false;
            try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("bmJsonViewer.render", _jsonRef, _selected.Json); }
            catch { }
        }
    }

    private async Task SaveDocumentAsync(MongoDocument? doc)
    {
        if (doc is null) return;
        _selected = doc;
        var pretty   = FormatJson(doc.Json);
        var filename = string.Concat($"{doc.Id}.json"
            .Select(c => Path.GetInvalidFileNameChars().Contains(c) ? '_' : c));
        await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("bmSaveFile", filename, pretty, "application/json");
    }

    private static string TruncateJson(string json)
        => json.Length > 140 ? json[..140] + "…" : json;

    private static string FormatJson(string raw)
    {
        try
        {
            var doc = System.Text.Json.JsonDocument.Parse(raw);
            return System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(
                doc.RootElement,
                new System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions { WriteIndented = true });
        }
        catch { return raw; }
    }

    public void Dispose()
    {
        _cts.Cancel();
        _selfRef?.Dispose();
    }
}
FILE src/NxtUI.Web/Pages/MongoDashboard.razor

@namespace NxtUI.Web.Pages
@using NxtUI.Core.Models
@using NxtUI.Core.Services
@inject IMongoService MongoSvc
@inject TabService TabService
@inject IDialogService DialogService
@inject ISnackbar Snackbar
@implements IDisposable

<div class="bm-page bm-page-fill">

    @if (_databaseNames.Count > 0)
    {
        <div class="bm-kafka-cluster-bar">
            <span class="bm-kafka-stat">
                <MudIcon Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Storage" Size="Size.Small" Class="bm-kafka-stat-icon" />
                Databases
                <strong>@_databaseNames.Count</strong>
            </span>
            @if (_totalCount > 0 || !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_filterText))
            {
                <span class="bm-kafka-stat">
                    <MudIcon Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.TableChart" Size="Size.Small" Class="bm-kafka-stat-icon" />
                    Collections
                    <strong>@_totalCount.ToString("N0")</strong>
                </span>
            }
        </div>
    }

    <!-- Toolbar -->
    <div class="bm-batch-toolbar">
        <div class="bm-mongo-db-wrap">
            <span class="bm-toolbar-label">DB</span>
            <MudSelect T="string" Value="_selectedDb" ValueChanged="OnDbChanged"
                       Dense="true" Margin="Margin.Dense" Variant="Variant.Outlined"
                       Class="bm-mongo-db-select" PopoverClass="bm-mongo-db-popover">
                @foreach (var name in _databaseNames)
                {
                    <MudSelectItem Value="@name">@name</MudSelectItem>
                }
            </MudSelect>
        </div>

        <FilterBox Value="@_filterText"
                   OnFilterChanged="OnFilterChanged"
                   ParseError="@_filterParseError"
                   Placeholder="Filter collections…"
                   Class="bm-filter-input"
                   FieldHints="@_fieldHints" />

        <MudTooltip Text="Refresh">
            <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Refresh"
                           Size="Size.Small"
                           Disabled="@_loading"
                           OnClick="LoadCollectionsAsync"
                           Class="bm-refresh-btn" />
        </MudTooltip>
    </div>

    <!-- Table -->
    <div class="bm-table-wrap">
        @if (_loading)
        {
            <MudProgressLinear Indeterminate="true" Color="Color.Primary" Class="bm-loading-bar" />
        }
        <MudTable T="MongoCollectionSummary"
                  Items="_paged"
                  Dense="true"
                  Hover="true"
                  Elevation="0"
                  Striped="true"
                  FixedHeader="true"
                  Height="100%"
                  Class="bm-batch-table">
            <HeaderContent>
                <MudTh>Collection</MudTh>
                <MudTh Style="width:130px; text-align:right;">Documents</MudTh>
                <MudTh Style="width:120px; text-align:right;">Storage</MudTh>
                <MudTh Style="width:80px; text-align:center;">Indexes</MudTh>
                <MudTh Style="width:90px; text-align:center;">Actions</MudTh>
            </HeaderContent>
            <RowTemplate>
                <MudTd @ondblclick="@(() => OpenInspector(context.Name))">
                    <span class="bm-kafka-topic-name">@context.Name</span>
                </MudTd>
                <MudTd Style="text-align:right;" @ondblclick="@(() => OpenInspector(context.Name))">
                    @if (context.StatsLoaded)
                    {
                        <span class="bm-kafka-mono">@context.DocumentCount.ToString("N0")</span>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <span class="bm-muted">—</span>
                    }
                </MudTd>
                <MudTd Style="text-align:right;" @ondblclick="@(() => OpenInspector(context.Name))">
                    @if (context.StatsLoaded)
                    {
                        <span class="bm-kafka-mono">@FormatBytes(context.StorageSizeBytes)</span>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <span class="bm-muted">—</span>
                    }
                </MudTd>
                <MudTd Style="text-align:center;" @ondblclick="@(() => OpenInspector(context.Name))">
                    @if (context.StatsLoaded) { @context.IndexCount }
                    else { <span class="bm-muted">—</span> }
                </MudTd>
                <MudTd Style="text-align:center;">
                    <div class="bm-row-actions">
                        <MudTooltip Text="Browse documents">
                            <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.ManageSearch"
                                           Size="Size.Small"
                                           OnClick="@(() => OpenInspector(context.Name))" />
                        </MudTooltip>
                        <MudTooltip Text="Collection info">
                            <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Info"
                                           Size="Size.Small"
                                           OnClick="@(() => ShowInfoAsync(context))" />
                        </MudTooltip>
                        <MudTooltip Text="Delete collection">
                            <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.DeleteOutline"
                                           Size="Size.Small"
                                           Color="Color.Error"
                                           OnClick="@(() => DeleteCollectionAsync(context.Name))" />
                        </MudTooltip>
                    </div>
                </MudTd>
            </RowTemplate>
        </MudTable>
    </div>

    <!-- Footer -->
    <div class="bm-batch-footer">
        <MudText Typo="Typo.body2" Class="bm-muted bm-footer-count">
            @_totalCount.ToString("N0") collection@(_totalCount == 1 ? "" : "s")
        </MudText>
        <MudPagination Count="_totalPages"
                       Selected="_page"
                       SelectedChanged="OnPageChanged"
                       ShowFirstButton="true"
                       ShowLastButton="true"
                       Size="Size.Small"
                       Class="bm-pagination-ctrl" />
        <div class="bm-rows-select">
            <MudText Typo="Typo.body2" Class="bm-muted" Style="white-space:nowrap;">Rows:</MudText>
            <MudSelect T="int" Value="_pageSize" ValueChanged="OnPageSizeChanged"
                       Dense="true" Variant="Variant.Outlined" Margin="Margin.Dense"
                       Style="width:90px;">
                <MudSelectItem Value="10">10</MudSelectItem>
                <MudSelectItem Value="25">25</MudSelectItem>
                <MudSelectItem Value="50">50</MudSelectItem>
                <MudSelectItem Value="100">100</MudSelectItem>
                <MudSelectItem Value="200">200</MudSelectItem>
            </MudSelect>
        </div>
    </div>

</div>

@code {
    [Parameter] public string Environment { get; set; } = string.Empty;

    private List<string>                 _databaseNames = new();
    private List<MongoCollectionSummary> _paged         = new();
    private string  _selectedDb       = string.Empty;
    private string  _filterText       = string.Empty;
    private string? _filterParseError = null;
    private bool    _loading          = false;
    private long    _totalCount       = 0;
    private int     _page = 1, _pageSize = 25, _totalPages = 1;
    private CancellationTokenSource _cts = new();

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] _fieldHints =
    [
        ("name / collection", "filter by collection name (e.g. batch*)"),
    ];

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        // Load database names only — fast even with 100+ databases (no dbStats).
        _databaseNames = (await MongoSvc.GetDatabaseNamesAsync(Environment, _cts.Token)).ToList();
        if (_databaseNames.Count > 0)
        {
            _selectedDb = _databaseNames[0];
            await LoadCollectionsAsync();
        }
    }

    private async Task OnDbChanged(string db)
    {
        _selectedDb = db;
        _filterText = string.Empty;
        _page       = 1;
        await LoadCollectionsAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadCollectionsAsync()
    {
        _cts.Cancel();
        _cts = new CancellationTokenSource();
        var ct = _cts.Token;

        _loading = true;
        StateHasChanged();
        try
        {
            var skip = (_page - 1) * _pageSize;
            var (collections, total) = await MongoSvc.GetCollectionPageAsync(
                Environment, _selectedDb,
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_filterText) ? null : _filterText,
                skip, _pageSize, ct);

            _paged      = collections.ToList();
            _totalCount = total;
            _totalPages = Math.Max(1, (int)Math.Ceiling(total / (double)_pageSize));
            _page       = Math.Clamp(_page, 1, _totalPages);
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { return; }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            Snackbar.Add($"Failed to load collections: {ex.Message}", Severity.Error);
        }
        finally
        {
            _loading = false;
        }
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private void OnFilterChanged(string text)
    {
        _filterText       = text;
        _filterParseError = null;
        _page             = 1;
        _ = LoadCollectionsAsync();
    }

    private void OnPageChanged(int p) { _page = p; _ = LoadCollectionsAsync(); }
    private void OnPageSizeChanged(int s) { _pageSize = s; _page = 1; _ = LoadCollectionsAsync(); }

    private void OpenInspector(string collection)
        => TabService.OpenOrFocus(TabModel.CreateMongoCollectionInspector(_selectedDb, collection, Environment));

    private async Task ShowInfoAsync(MongoCollectionSummary col)
    {
        var parameters = new DialogParameters<MongoCollectionInfoDialog>
        {
            { x => x.Collection,  col          },
            { x => x.Database,    _selectedDb  },
            { x => x.Environment, Environment  },
        };
        await DialogService.ShowAsync<MongoCollectionInfoDialog>(col.Name, parameters,
            new DialogOptions { MaxWidth = MaxWidth.Medium, FullWidth = false });
    }

    private async Task<bool> ConfirmAsync(string message, string confirmText = "Delete")
    {
        var dialog = await DialogService.ShowAsync<ConfirmDialog>("Confirm", new DialogParameters<ConfirmDialog>
        {
            { x => x.Message,     message     },
            { x => x.ConfirmText, confirmText },
        }, new DialogOptions { MaxWidth = MaxWidth.ExtraSmall });
        var result = await dialog.Result;
        return result is { Canceled: false };
    }

    private async Task DeleteCollectionAsync(string collection)
    {
        if (!await ConfirmAsync($"Drop \"{collection}\" from {_selectedDb}? This cannot be undone.")) return;
        await MongoSvc.DropCollectionAsync(Environment, _selectedDb, collection, _cts.Token);
        Snackbar.Add($"Collection \"{collection}\" dropped.", Severity.Success);
        await LoadCollectionsAsync();
    }

    public void Dispose() => _cts.Cancel();
}
FILE src/NxtUI.Web/Pages/MongoDashboard.razor.cs
LENGTH 361
namespace NxtUI.Web.Pages;

public partial class MongoDashboard
{
    private static string FormatBytes(long b) => b switch
    {
        < 1024                => $"{b} B",
        < 1024 * 1024         => $"{b / 1024} KB",
        < 1024L * 1024 * 1024 => $"{b / (1024 * 1024)} MB",
        _                     => $"{b / (1024L * 1024 * 1024)} GB",
    };
}

        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Environment))
        {
            <MudText Typo="Typo.body2" Class="bm-muted">@Environment</MudText>

        </MudText>
    </div>

FILE src/NxtUI.Web/Pages/RunDetail.razor
LENGTH 16166
@namespace NxtUI.Web.Pages
@using NxtUI.Web.Models
@inject IRunService RunService
@inject TabService TabService
@inject SignalRConnectionService SignalR
@inject IJSRuntime JS
@implements IDisposable

@code {
    [Parameter, EditorRequired] public string? RunId { get; set; }
    [Parameter, EditorRequired] public string Environment { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    [Parameter, EditorRequired] public TabModel? Tab { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public bool IsFocused { get; set; }

    private bool _previousIsFocused;
    private bool _allowNextRender = true;

    // ── Data ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    private RunDetails? _details;
    private bool _loading = true;

    private PerformanceEventService? _eventService;
    private TopologyComputationService? _topologyService;
    private CancellationTokenSource? _topologyDebounce;
    private const int TopologyDebounceMs = 400;

    // ── Topology (live and replay) ────────────────────────────────────────
    private Topology? _topology;
    private int _eventCount;

    // ── Replay mode (Step 8) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
    private DateTime? _replayTimestamp;
    private bool IsReplay => _replayTimestamp.HasValue;

    // Slider uses 0–1000 integer steps; converted to/from timestamps internally.
    private DateTime _sliderMin;
    private DateTime _sliderMax;
    private double   _sliderValue;   // 0–1000
    private const double SliderSteps = 1000.0;

    // ── UI ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    private bool _detailsExpanded;
    private string LocalStorageKey => "bm_run_details_strip_expanded";

    // ── Lifecycle ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        _previousIsFocused = IsFocused;
        _topologyService   = new TopologyComputationService();

        try
        {
            var stored = await JS.InvokeAsync<string?>("localStorage.getItem", LocalStorageKey);
            _detailsExpanded = stored == "true";
        }
        catch { }

        await LoadAsync();
    }

    protected override void OnParametersSet()
    {
        if (IsFocused == _previousIsFocused) return;

        var gained = IsFocused && !_previousIsFocused;
        var lost   = !IsFocused && _previousIsFocused;
        _previousIsFocused = IsFocused;

        if (_eventService is not null) _eventService.IsFocused = IsFocused;

        if (gained)      StateHasChanged();
        else if (lost) { _allowNextRender = true; StateHasChanged(); }
    }

    protected override bool ShouldRender()
    {
        if (IsFocused) return true;
        if (_allowNextRender) { _allowNextRender = false; return true; }
        return false;
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        _loading = true;
        StateHasChanged();
        try
        {
            _details = await RunService.GetRunDetailsAsync(Environment, RunId ?? string.Empty);
            if (_details is not null && RunId is not null)
                await StartEventServiceAsync();
        }
        catch { _details = null; }
        finally { _loading = false; StateHasChanged(); }
    }

    private async Task StartEventServiceAsync()
    {
        if (_details is null || RunId is null) return;

        _eventService = new PerformanceEventService(RunService);

        await _eventService.StartAsync(
            env:            Environment,
            runId:          RunId,
            startTime: _details.Start,
            isRunning:      _details.Status == RunStatus.Running,
            isFocused:      IsFocused,
            onEventsUpdated: DebouncedTopologyCompute,
            signalR:        SignalR);
    }

    private void DebouncedTopologyCompute()
    {
        _topologyDebounce?.Cancel();
        _topologyDebounce?.Dispose();
        _topologyDebounce = new CancellationTokenSource();
        var token = _topologyDebounce.Token;

        _ = Task.Delay(TopologyDebounceMs, token).ContinueWith(async _ =>
        {
            if (token.IsCancellationRequested) return;
            try
            {
                if (_eventService is null || _topologyService is null) return;

                var allEvents = _eventService.Events;

                IReadOnlyDictionary<string, PerformanceEvent> filtered = _replayTimestamp.HasValue
                    ? allEvents.Where(kv => kv.Value.Start <= _replayTimestamp.Value)
                               .ToDictionary(kv => kv.Key, kv => kv.Value)
                    : allEvents;

                _topology   = _topologyService.ComputeTopology(filtered);
                _eventCount = _eventService.EventCount;

                UpdateSliderRange(allEvents.Values);

                await InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.WriteLine($"[RunDetail] Topology compute error: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }, TaskScheduler.Default);
    }

    // ── Slider & Replay ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private void UpdateSliderRange(IEnumerable<PerformanceEvent> events)
    {
        var list = events.ToList();
        if (list.Count == 0) return;

        _sliderMin = list.Min(e => e.Start);
        _sliderMax = list.Max(e => e.Finish ?? e.Start);

        // In LIVE mode keep the thumb at the right edge.
        if (!IsReplay) _sliderValue = SliderSteps;
    }

    // Convert 0–1000 slider position to a DateTime within [_sliderMin, _sliderMax].
    private DateTime SliderToDateTime(double value)
    {
        if (_sliderMax <= _sliderMin) return _sliderMax;
        var fraction = Math.Clamp(value / SliderSteps, 0.0, 1.0);
        var totalMs  = (_sliderMax - _sliderMin).TotalMilliseconds;
        return _sliderMin.AddMilliseconds(fraction * totalMs);
    }

    private void OnSliderChanged(double value)
    {
        _sliderValue = value;

        // Snap to LIVE when dragged to/past the right edge.
        if (value >= SliderSteps - 1)
        {
            EnterLiveMode();
            return;
        }

        _replayTimestamp = SliderToDateTime(value);
        DebouncedTopologyCompute();
    }

    private void EnterLiveMode()
    {
        _replayTimestamp = null;
        _sliderValue     = SliderSteps;
        DebouncedTopologyCompute();
    }

    private void EnterReplayMode()
    {
        if (_sliderMax <= _sliderMin) return;
        _sliderValue     = SliderSteps * 0.75;
        _replayTimestamp = SliderToDateTime(_sliderValue);
        DebouncedTopologyCompute();
    }

    private string FormatSliderTime()
    {
        if (!IsReplay || _replayTimestamp is null) return "LIVE";
        var ts = _replayTimestamp.Value.ToLocalTime();
        return ts.ToString("HH:mm:ss");
    }

    // ── Top bar helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private RunStatus EffectiveStatus => _details?.Status ?? RunStatus.Unknown;
    private int DoneCount       => _topology?.TotalDone       ?? 0;
    private int InProgressCount => _topology?.TotalInProgress ?? 0;
    private int ProgressPercent => _topology is null ? 0 : (int)Math.Round(_topology.EstimatedProgress * 100);
    private Color ProgressColor => EffectiveStatus switch
    {
        RunStatus.Running => Color.Success,
        RunStatus.Failed  => Color.Error,
        _                   => Color.Default
    };

    private async Task ToggleDetailsStrip()
    {
        _detailsExpanded = !_detailsExpanded;
        try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("localStorage.setItem", LocalStorageKey, _detailsExpanded.ToString().ToLower()); }
        catch { }
    }

    private async Task CancelRunAsync()
    {
        if (RunId is null) return;
        if (await RunService.CancelRunAsync(Environment, RunId)) await LoadAsync();
    }

    private void OpenTimeline()
    {
        if (RunId is null) return;
        TabService.OpenOrFocus(TabModel.CreateTimeline(RunId, Environment));
    }

    // ── Dispose ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    public void Dispose()
    {
        _eventService?.Dispose();
        _topologyDebounce?.Cancel();
        _topologyDebounce?.Dispose();
    }

    private static string FormatDuration(TimeSpan ts) =>
        ts.TotalHours >= 1
            ? $"{(int)ts.TotalHours:D2}:{ts.Minutes:D2}:{ts.Seconds:D2}"
            : $"{ts.Minutes:D2}:{ts.Seconds:D2}";
}

<div class="bm-page-fill bm-batch-detail">

    <!-- ── Top bar ── -->
    <div class="bm-detail-topbar @(_loading ? "loading" : "")">
        <div class="bm-detail-topbar-left">
            <span class="bm-status-chip-dot bm-status-@(EffectiveStatus.ToString().ToLower())"></span>
            <span class="bm-status-chip-label bm-status-@(EffectiveStatus.ToString().ToLower())">
                @EffectiveStatus
            </span>

            <span class="bm-detail-batch-name">@(_details?.Name ?? "Loading…")</span>

            @if (IsReplay)
            {
                <span class="bm-replay-chip">
                    <MudIcon Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.History" Size="Size.Small" />
                    REPLAY @FormatSliderTime()
                </span>
            }

            @if (_topology is not null)
            {
                <span class="bm-detail-count bm-detail-count-done" title="Done">
                    <MudIcon Icon="@Icons.Material.Filled.CheckCircleOutline" Size="Size.Small" />
                    @DoneCount.ToString("N0")
                </span>
                <span class="bm-detail-count bm-detail-count-inprogress" title="In progress">
                    <MudIcon Icon="@Icons.Material.Filled.Sync" Size="Size.Small" />
                    @InProgressCount.ToString("N0")
                </span>
                <div class="bm-detail-progress">
                    <MudProgressLinear Value="@ProgressPercent" Color="@ProgressColor"
                                       Size="Size.Small" Class="bm-detail-progress-bar" />
                    <span class="bm-detail-progress-label">~@(ProgressPercent)%</span>
                </div>
            }
        </div>

        <div class="bm-detail-topbar-actions">
            <MudTooltip Text="Open Timeline">
                <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Timeline" Size="Size.Small" OnClick="OpenTimeline" />
            </MudTooltip>

            @if (EffectiveStatus == RunStatus.Running)
            {
                <MudTooltip Text="Cancel run">
                    <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Stop" Size="Size.Small"
                                   Color="Color.Error" OnClick="CancelRunAsync" />
                </MudTooltip>
            }

            <MudTooltip Text="@(_detailsExpanded ? "Collapse details" : "Expand details")">
                <MudIconButton Icon="@(_detailsExpanded ? Icons.Material.Outlined.ExpandLess : Icons.Material.Outlined.ExpandMore)"
                               Size="Size.Small" OnClick="ToggleDetailsStrip" />
            </MudTooltip>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── Details strip ── -->
    @if (_detailsExpanded)
    {
        <div class="bm-detail-strip">
            @if (_loading)
            {
                <MudProgressLinear Indeterminate="true" Color="Color.Primary" />
            }
            else if (_details is null)
            {
                <MudText Class="bm-muted">Details not available</MudText>
            }
            else
            {
                <div class="bm-detail-strip-grid">
                    <div class="bm-details-row">
                        <div class="bm-details-key">RunId</div>
                        <div class="bm-details-value bm-monospace">@_details.RunId</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="bm-details-row">
                        <div class="bm-details-key">Type</div>
                        <div class="bm-details-value">@_details.Type</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="bm-details-row">
                        <div class="bm-details-key">Start</div>
                        <div class="bm-details-value">@_details.Start.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss") UTC</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="bm-details-row">
                        <div class="bm-details-key">Duration</div>
                        <div class="bm-details-value">@FormatDuration(_details.Duration)</div>
                    </div>
                    @foreach (var kv in _details.Metadata)
                    {
                        <div class="bm-details-row">
                            <div class="bm-details-key">@kv.Key</div>
                            <div class="bm-details-value">@kv.Value</div>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            }
        </div>
    }

    <!-- ── Graph ── -->
    <div class="bm-batch-graph" style="position:relative">
        @* D3FlowGraph stays mounted permanently — mounting/unmounting it races
           with Blazor's DOM patcher and causes removeChild crashes. *@
        <D3FlowGraph Topology="@(_topology ?? new Topology())" IsVisible="@(IsFocused && _topology?.Nodes.Count > 0)" />
        @if (_loading)
        {
            <div class="bm-graph-overlay"><div class="bm-graph-loading">Loading…</div></div>
        }
        else if (_topology == null || _topology.Nodes.Count == 0)
        {
            <div class="bm-graph-overlay"><div class="bm-graph-loading bm-graph-loading-pulse">Waiting for first events…</div></div>
        }
    </div>

    <!-- ── Timeline slider (Step 8) ── -->
    <div class="bm-batch-detail-footer">
        <div class="bm-slider-row">
            @if (IsReplay)
            {
                <MudTooltip Text="Return to live view">
                    <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.FiberManualRecord"
                                   Color="Color.Error" Size="Size.Small"
                                   Class="bm-live-btn"
                                   OnClick="EnterLiveMode" />
                </MudTooltip>
            }
            else
            {
                <MudTooltip Text="Scrub timeline (enter replay mode)">
                    <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.History"
                                   Size="Size.Small"
                                   Class="bm-replay-btn"
                                   OnClick="EnterReplayMode" />
                </MudTooltip>
            }

            <span class="bm-slider-label bm-muted">@(_sliderMin == default ? "" : _sliderMin.ToLocalTime().ToString("HH:mm:ss"))</span>

            <MudSlider Class="bm-timeline-slider"
                       Min="0.0" Max="@SliderSteps"
                       Step="1.0"
                       Value="@_sliderValue"
                       ValueChanged="@((double v) => OnSliderChanged(v))"
                       Disabled="@(_sliderMax <= _sliderMin)" />

            <span class="bm-slider-label bm-muted">@(_sliderMax == default ? "" : _sliderMax.ToLocalTime().ToString("HH:mm:ss"))</span>

            <span class="bm-slider-count bm-muted">@_eventCount events</span>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@namespace NxtUI.Web.Pages
@inject IRunService RunService
@inject TabService TabService
@inject ISnackbar Snackbar
@using NxtUI.Filtering
@implements IDisposable

<div class="bm-page bm-page-fill">

                            <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Timeline"

@code {
    [Parameter, EditorRequired] public string Environment { get; set; } = string.Empty;

    private int _page     = 1;
    private int _pageSize = 25;
    private Result<List<RunSummary>> _result;
    private string  _filterText       = string.Empty;
    private string? _filterParseError = null;

    private static readonly string[] RunSearchableFields = ["Name", "RunId", "Type", "Status"];
    private static readonly FilterParser RunFilterParser   = new(RunSearchableFields);

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] _runFieldHints =
    [
        ("name", "run name"),
        ("run / runid",     "run identifier"),
        ("type",            "run type"),
        ("status",          "Running / Completed / Failed"),
    ];

    private List<RunSummary> _all      = new();
    private List<RunSummary> _filtered = new();
    private List<RunSummary> _paged    = new();
    private int _totalPages => Math.Max(1, (int)Math.Ceiling((double)_filtered.Count / _pageSize));

    private CancellationTokenSource _cts = new();

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync() =>
        await LoadAsync();

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        _result = default; // loading
        StateHasChanged();
        try
        {
            _all = await RunService.GetRunsAsync(
                Environment, DateTime.UtcNow, 200, ct: _cts.Token);
            ApplyFilter();
            _result = Result<List<RunSummary>>.Ok(_all);
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            _result = Result<List<RunSummary>>.Fail(ex.Message);
        }
    }

    private void OnFilterChanged(string text)
    {
        _filterText = text;
        _filterParseError = null;

        FilterNode? node = null;
        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(text))
        {
            try   { node = RunFilterParser.Parse(text); }
            catch (FilterParseException ex) { _filterParseError = ex.Message; }
        }

        _filtered = node is null
            ? _all
            : _all.Where(b => FilterEvaluator.Evaluate(node, b)).ToList();

        _page = 1;
        RebuildPage();
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private void ApplyFilter() => OnFilterChanged(_filterText);

    private void RebuildPage() =>
        _paged = _filtered.Skip((_page - 1) * _pageSize).Take(_pageSize).ToList();

    private void OnPageChanged(int page) { _page = page; RebuildPage(); }

    private void OnPageSizeChanged(int size) { _pageSize = size; _page = 1; RebuildPage(); }

    private async Task RefreshAsync()
    {
        _filterText       = string.Empty;
        _filterParseError = null;
        await LoadAsync();
        Snackbar.Add("Refreshed", Severity.Normal, c => c.VisibleStateDuration = 1500);
    }

    private void OpenDetail(RunSummary b) =>
        TabService.OpenOrFocus(TabModel.CreateRunDetail(b.RunId, b.Name, Environment));

    private void OpenTimeline(RunSummary b) =>
        TabService.OpenOrFocus(TabModel.CreateTimeline(b.RunId, Environment));

    private async Task StopRunAsync(RunSummary b)
    {
        var ok = await RunService.CancelRunAsync(Environment, b.RunId, _cts.Token);
        if (ok)
        {
            Snackbar.Add($"Stop requested for {b.Name}", Severity.Warning);
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        else
            Snackbar.Add("Could not stop run", Severity.Error);
    }

    private static string FormatDuration(TimeSpan ts) =>
        ts.TotalHours >= 1
            ? $"{(int)ts.TotalHours:D2}:{ts.Minutes:D2}:{ts.Seconds:D2}"
            : $"{ts.Minutes:D2}:{ts.Seconds:D2}";

    public void Dispose() => _cts.Cancel();
}

            <!-- Card view — grouping supported (pure Blazor, no JS conflict).
                 The container is @key'd by the grouping mode: switching grouping
                 moves cards between *different* parent card-rows, and Blazor's
                 @key only reconciles within one parent — a cross-parent move makes
                 it compute insertBefore against a node whose parent is already
                 detached (null). Re-keying the container forces a full teardown +
                 rebuild on grouping change, so no card is ever diffed across
                 parents. Within a grouping mode the key is stable, so polling
                 updates still diff cards in place by their per-card @key. -->
            <div class="bm-svc-cards" @key="@($"groupmode:{_groupBy}")">
                @foreach (var group in GetGroups(_filtered))
                {
                    <div class="bm-svc-group" @key="@(group.Key ?? "__ungrouped__")">
                        @if (group.Key != null)
                        {

                                }
                                <span class="bm-svc-group-count">@group.Count()</span>

                            @foreach (var s in group)

                                var cardKey      = ServiceKey(s);

                                <div @key="@cardKey"
                                     class="@($"bm-svc-card {(s.IsOnline ? "bm-svc-online" : "bm-svc-offline")} {(cardSearching ? "bm-svc-searching" : "")}")"
                                     @ondblclick="@(() => OpenLogViewerAsync(s))"
                                     @onclick="@(async (MouseEventArgs e) => { if (e.CtrlKey) await CopyPathAsync(s); })">
                                    @if (spark is not null)
                                    {
                                        @spark.Svg
